 candidate possess the ability to write functional code and have a keen eye for identifying and resolving defects. Your primary objective will be to collaborate with our internal teams to design, develop, and maintain high-quality software solutions.
   

  

 If you have a genuine passion for the .NET framework and possess a strong understanding of software design and architecture , and you are excited about shaping the future of technology, we encourage you to apply and be part of the Expleo team in Sweden.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Participate in requirements analysis
* Collaborate with internal teams to produce software design and architecture
* Write clean, scalable code using .NET programming languages
* Test and deploy applications and systems
* Revise, update, refactor and debug code
* Improve existing software
* Develop documentation throughout the software development life cycle (SDLC)
* Serve as an expert on applications and provide technical support


**Qualifications**
* Proven experience as a .NET Developer
* Familiarity with the ASP.NET framework, SQL Server and design/architectural patterns (e.g. Model-View-Controller (MVC))
* Knowledge of at least one of the .NET languages (e.g. C#, Visual Basic .NET) and HTML5/CSS3
* Familiarity with architecture styles/APIs (REST, RPC)
* Understanding of Agile methodologies
* Excellent troubleshooting and communication skills
* Attention to detail
* BSc/BA in Computer Science, Engineering or a related field
* Experience with salesforce application will be beneficial


**Benefits**
**Who are we?**
 Expleo is a rapidly growing consulting company dedicated to delivering innovative solutions in the fields of AI engineering, digitalization, hyper-automation, cybersecurity, and data science. With a strong commitment to integrity, diversity, sustainability, and societal security, Expleo is at the forefront of creating a better future. Join our dynamic team and be part of our journey to shape the future of technology and business.
   

  

**What do we offer?**
* Join a rapidly growing consulting company at the forefront of technological innovation.
* Work in a dynamic and diverse environment that values integrity and sustainability.
* Collaborate with experts in AI engineering, digitalization, hyper-automation, cybersecurity, and data science.
* Opportunities for career growth and development.
* Be part of a team dedicated to creating a more secure and sustainable society.


 "We are an equal opportunities employer and welcome applications from all suitably qualified persons regardless of their race, sex, disability, religion/belief, sexual orientation or age ”.

title: Full-stack Developer
description:
**About This Vacancy**
 At our company, you will work closely with our clients in Greater Stockholm on projects spanning the entire development chain, from backend and database layers to modern frontend frameworks. The role includes responsibilities such as developing robust solutions, optimizing code, building integrations, and contributing to scalable systems in cloud environments. You'll be working in a dynamic environment with close collaboration between various teams, giving you the opportunity to develop both technical and communication skills. As an Employeneur at TMC, you will carry out assignments where your expertise makes a difference. At the same time, you will become part of our business cell Digital & IT in Stockholm, where we are building a strong network of developers and specialists.
   

  

**What We Expect From You**
 We believe you have:
   

  

* A college or university education in a relevant field (at least a BSc, MSc is a plus)
* At least five years of experience in software development with a focus on backend
* Strong experience in Java, Node, .NET/C#, and/or Go
* Experience with React, Angular, Vue, and/or Next
* Proficiency in working with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
* Experience with CI/CD, Docker, and Kubernetes
* An understanding of microservices
* We assume you are fluent in both Swedish and English.


 It is a plus if you have a background in IT security, DevOps, IaC, cybersecurity, AI/ML, or data engineering.
   

  

**What You Can Expect From Us**
 In the role of Employeneur, you get to both develop your technical skills and drive your own personal growth and business. You become part of an innovative and entrepreneurial organization where the focus is on continuous development and the opportunity to take responsibility for steering your own career.
   

  

 We place great emphasis on your personal commitment and your willingness to drive your development forward. To succeed in this, you are given the chance to influence the type of projects you take on as well as the skills development you want to invest in. In short, you are in control of your career.
   

  

 Since TMC is an international company, we can offer projects in various locations and countries where we and our clients are present. Currently, we are represented in Sweden, the Netherlands, Belgium, France, Germany, Luxembourg, Spain, Portugal, Italy, Hungary, the U.A.E., Mexico, the USA, and Canada. You get the world as your workplace!

title: Senior Frontend Developer – Frontend Platform Engineer
description:
We are looking for an experienced
 **Senior Frontend Developer** 
 to join a team responsible for building and maintaining a central frontend platform used across multiple business-critical applications and development teams.
   

  

 The role focuses on developing scalable frontend architecture, reusable UI components, shared libraries, and modern development tooling with strong emphasis on developer experience, maintainability, and platform scalability.
   

  

 You will work in a modern microfrontend environment where Web Components form the foundation of the frontend architecture. The solutions are designed to be framework-independent and reusable across different technical ecosystems.
   

  

 This is a highly collaborative role involving close interaction with frontend teams, UX specialists, architects, and other stakeholders across the organization.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Develop and maintain shared frontend platforms and common libraries
* Build reusable, scalable, and modern UI components
* Work with microfrontend architecture and Web Components
* Improve developer experience through tooling, templates, and build solutions
* Collaborate closely with frontend teams and UX specialists
* Support and guide teams using shared frontend components and platform solutions
* Participate in architecture discussions and technical evaluations
* Work with both new development and maintenance of business-critical applications
* Participate in support and operational activities when required
* Language - Swedish is mandatory


**Technical Environment**
* HTML
* JavaScript / TypeScript
* Web Components
* Vue
* Svelte
* Microfrontend Architecture
* SystemJS
* Vite
* Rollup
* Esbuild
* SCSS / CSS
* Storybook


**Required Qualifications**
* Several years of experience in frontend development
* Strong expertise in:
+ JavaScript
+ TypeScript
+ HTML
+ Modern frontend frameworks (preferably Vue)

* Experience with:
+ Microfrontend architecture
+ Web Components
+ Design systems
+ Component libraries

* Experience building scalable, reusable, and maintainable frontend solutions
* Strong interest in frontend architecture and component-driven development
* Experience working in Agile development environments


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with accessibility and WCAG compliance
* Experience with AI-related development tools or AI-assisted engineering workflows
* Knowledge of Azure DevOps and infrastructure-related tooling
* Experience working with enterprise-scale frontend platforms


 Personal Attributes
   

  

 We are looking for someone who:
   

  

* Enjoys working in a collaborative environment with multiple stakeholders
* Is proactive and solution-oriented
* Can manage multiple parallel initiatives
* Has strong communication and teamwork skills
* Is passionate about modern frontend technologies and continuous improvement
* Contributes to knowledge sharing and platform best practices

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Är du en backend-utvecklare som vill vara med och skapa framtidens digitala bankupplevelse tillsammans med andra som brinner för teknik och samhällsnytta?**
 Avanza söker nu en engagerad utvecklare som vill vara med och forma nästa generations digitala tjänster för sparande, investeringar och bank. Hos oss kombineras teknikintresse med samhällsengagemang, i team där gemenskap, samarbete och inkludering är en självklar del av vardagen. Vi tror på ett arbetsliv där det går att vara både ambitiös och mänsklig, där balans och meningsfullhet är lika viktiga som innovation.
   

  

 Om rollen
   

  

 Som Software Engineer hos oss på Avanza blir du en nyckelspelare i en av Sveriges mest spännande teknikresor. Vi har påbörjat en omfattande molntransformering mot Google Cloud Platform (GCP). Vårt mål är tydligt: Till 2030 ska vi huvudsakligen vara helt molnbaserade och under 2026 växlar vi upp tempot rejält med målsättningen att migrera över 100 tjänster.
   

  

 Du kommer att tillhöra ett av våra 45 autonoma team där du jobbar nära din Product Manager och dina designers. Våra team arbetar med Order Management System, strömmad data, höga transaktionsvolymer, datadriven utveckling och Machine Learning. Beroende på vilket team du landar i kommer din vardag handla om allt från att vidareutveckla vår högpresterande on-prem-miljö till att bryta ny mark i molnet. Du får vara med och sätta standarden för hur vi modellerar data och bygger skalbara tjänster i en modern molnmiljö.
   

  

 Din tekniska vardag
   

  

 Vi Rör Oss Från En Arkitektur Byggd På Gigaspaces Och Interna Plattformar Mot En Modern, Molnbaserad Stack. Där Kommer Du Att Arbeta Med
   

  

* Java som huvudspråk för våra mikrotjänster
* GCP som vår framtida hemvist, där vi bygger för hög tillgänglighet och skalbarhet
* Modern datamodellering i molnet, med Google Spanner för applikationsdata och BigQuery för data warehousing
* Kommunikation via gRPC och händelsestyrda flöden med Kafka


 Vem är du?
   

  

 Vi söker dig som älskar problemlösning och som vill bygga system som gör skillnad för över två miljoner kunder. I rollen som utvecklare gillar du att dela med dig av dina kunskaper och du lockas av utmaningen i att migrera komplexa system till molnet.
   

  

 Som person ser vi att du är en nyfiken och kommunikativ lagspelare som trivs bäst när du får lösa komplexa problem tillsammans med andra. Du tar stort ansvar för den tekniska kvaliteten och drivs av att skriva välstrukturerad, testbar och skalbar kod, samtidigt som du också har ett naturligt helhetstänk, där du vill bidra till både teamets arbetssätt och produktens utveckling.
   

  

 På Avanza får du en kultur som präglas av prestigelöshet, en miljö där det är självklart att fråga samt dela med sig av kunskap och där vi ser varje utmaning eller misslyckande som en möjlighet att lära oss och växa tillsammans.
   

  

 Vi tror att du
   

  

* Har minst 4 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet
* Har gedigen erfarenhet av att bygga och underhålla distribuerade system och API:er i Java
* Har erfarenhet av att utveckla och driftsätta tjänster i molnmiljö (Cloud Native)
* Förstår och kan läsa svenska obehindrat


 Det är meriterande om du har
   

  

* Erfarenhet av Google Cloud Platform (GCP)
* Erfarenhet av molnbaserade databaser såsom Google Spanner och/eller analytiska plattformar som BigQuery, gärna med dbt för datatransformering
* Erfarenhet av vår nuvarande stack (t.ex. Gigaspaces eller liknande in-memory-lösningar) för att hjälpa oss i bryggan mellan on-prem och moln
* Vana av att jobba med händelsestyrd arkitektur (Kafka)


 En kultur för gemenskap och hållbarhet
   

  

 Vi tror att de bästa resultaten uppstår i trygga team där alla får komma till tals. Därför lägger vi stor vikt vid samarbete, öppenhet och arbetsglädje. Vi strävar efter jämställda team där alla känner sig trygga att vara sig själva och bidra med sin unika kompetens. Hos oss får du utrymme att utvecklas i din egen takt och kombinera arbetet med ett hållbart liv.
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

 Skicka din ansökan genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök” nedan. Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

*Erbjudanden från rekryteringsföretag/annonssäljare undanbedes.*
 Avanza är Sveriges ledande plattform för sparande och placeringar. Vi drivs av att förändra branschen genom att utmana de stora bankerna och försäkringsbolagen på den svenska sparmarknaden. Vi vill vara tjänsten som förenklar och förbättrar spararnas ekonomi, oavsett om man älskar aktier eller bara vill ha ett bra sparande. Vår vision är att skapa en bättre framtid för miljoner människor. Därför står våra kunders bästa alltid i fokus, precis som det borde vara. Affärsidén är enkel – mer till dig, mindre till banken. En idé som gett oss Sveriges nöjdaste sparare 15 år i rad.

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
**Company Description**
 AFRY provides engineering, design, digital and advisory services. We are devoted experts in industry, energy and infrastructure sectors, creating impact for generations to come. AFRY has Nordic roots with a global reach. Our shared principles - Results driven, Client Centric, Empowering and Accountable - guide us in how we work, grow and succeed together. Join us and unlock transitions towards a sustainable and resilient society.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Do you want to be part of a leading European company that accelerates the transition toward a sustainable society? We are now looking for a Full Stack Developer to join the Global Business Applications team at AFRY. You will work in a modern workplace with challenging assignments, exciting projects, and a strong focus on sustainable digital solutions.
   

  

 As a
 **Full Stack Developer** 
 you will be part of a committed agile team responsible for developing business critical applications and integrations that support operational excellence. You will collaborate closely within your team and cross functionally with developers, business analysts, architects, testers, and the team lead.
   

  

 The environment is based on modern microservices architecture in a Microsoft technology stack using C# and .NET. The solutions are built on Azure cloud services with a strong focus on scalability, reliability, and continuous improvement of sustainable IT practices across AFRY.
   

  

 The team primarily focuses on internal HR related applications and integrations supporting different parts of the employee journey. The platform is built with modern .NET Core and React with Redux. The role includes both backend development and frontend work with a strong focus on usability and user experience.
   

  

 The position is based at the Solna office with the possibility to work remotely up to three days per week.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 We expect you to have:
   

  

* A relevant university degree within computer science, software engineering, or a similar field.
* Around five years of experience working as a fullstack developer or in a comparable role.
* Experience working with Azure cloud services and infrastructure as code.
* Strong knowledge of SQL and relational databases.
* Experience with frontend development in React or similar frameworks.
* Fluent knowledge in English, both spoken and written.


 Experience in payroll integrations and Swedish language skills are considered strong merits.
   

  

**Additional Information**
 With us, you will have the opportunity to benefit from:
   

  

* An individual development plan focused on your area of expertise
* Competitive benefits related to pension, wellness, and parental leave, regulated through our collective agreement
* Company discounts with external partners through our benefits portal Benifex
* Wellness allowance of 4 500 SEK per year
* Access to a large network of technical experts


 If you have questions regarding the position, you are welcome to contact:
 **Team Lead, Martin Lindström,** 
 at martin.lindstrom@afry.com
   

  

 If you have questions about the recruitment process you can contact:
 **Talent Acquisition Partner, Sofia Enander** 
 , at sofia.enander@afry.com
   

  

 The position is a permanent employment. The last day to apply is 26/6-2026. We apply continuous selection, and the position may be filled before the application deadline.
   

  

*At AFRY, we engineer change in everything we do. Change happens when brave ideas come together. When we collaborate, innovate technology, and embrace challenging points of view. That’s how we're making future. We are actively looking for qualified candidates to join our inclusive and diverse teams across the globe. Join us in accelerating the transition towards a sustainable future.*

title: Platform Developer
description:
Do you enjoy working at the intersection of marketing technology, development, and business needs? Do you have hands-on experience with Adobe Campaign and a passion for building scalable MarTech solutions? Then you might be the Platform Developer we are looking for in Tryg’s Nordic Marketing Automation & MarTech team.
   

  

 You will join a Nordic team working across Denmark, Sweden, and Norway to develop and maintain customer communication and marketing automation solutions across Tryg and Trygg-Hansa.
   

  

 The role combines hands-on development, technical advisory, and close collaboration with Product Owners, Architects, developers, and business stakeholders across the Nordics.
   

  

**About the role | Driving Nordic MarTech solutions**
 Your primary responsibilities will include:
   

  

* Developing and maintaining solutions in Adobe Campaign Classic
* Designing workflows, integrations, campaigns, and custom solutions
* Supporting onboarding and adoption across Nordic business units
* Investigating incidents and implementing fixes
* Contributing to best practices, documentation, and continuous improvements
* Collaborating with stakeholders to translate business needs into technical solutions.


**About you | Technically strong and collaborative**
 We imagine that you:
   

  

* Have solid hands-on experience with Marketing Automation platforms, preferably Adobe Campaign
* Have development experience with workflows, integrations, APIs, and data models
* Are experienced with JavaScript, XML, HTML/CSS, and ETL processes
* Understand omni-channel customer communication platforms
* Thrive in agile and collaborative environments
* Communicate fluently in English and preferably one Nordic language.


 Experience with Adobe Campaign Classic and enterprise MarTech environments is considered an advantage.
   

  

**About us | Make a Nordic impact and work across borders as one team**
 You’ll be part of a Nordic team working across Ballerup, Stockholm and Bergen. Even though we’re based in different countries, we collaborate closely, share knowledge openly, and solve challenges together.
   

  

 We’re not just running tools – we’re building capabilities. You’ll have real influence on how marketing technology and automation develop across the Nordics.
   

  

 As a growing team, there’s room to take responsibility, deepen your expertise, and help shape future solutions and ways of working. We value autonomy, flexibility, and a supportive environment where people enjoy working together and learning from each other.
   

  

**Curious?**
 Send your application as soon as possible, but no later than 10 June, as we conduct interviews on an ongoing basis.
   

  

 If you have any questions regarding the role, you are welcome to contact Petra Talamo, Head of Nordic Marketing Automation/MarTech, +46 70 168 28 63, petra.talamo@trygghansa.se.
   

  

 Fackliga representanter
   

  

 Akademikerföreningen: Lena Darin, lena.darin@trygghansa.se, 070-168 28 44
   

  

 Forena: Elias Bakk, elias.bakk@trygghansa.se, 070-730 68 54

title: Senior Python Developer
description:
**Craft:**
 Technology & Development
   

  

**Job Description:**
 We’re looking for a Senior Platform Engineer (Python focus) to join our ML Toolchain team, the group building the internal platform that enables machine learning at scale across King.
   

  

 This is a platform engineering role with a strong focus on building internal products: Python services, APIs, and client tooling that make it easy for teams to run and manage ML workloads. The platform abstracts away infrastructure complexity and provides a self-service experience for ML engineers and data scientists across the company.
   

  

 You’ll work in a small, senior team with end-to-end ownership of the platform. While some engineers lean more toward infrastructure, this role is primarily focused on backend and platform development, designing and evolving the services that orchestrate ML workflows on top of Kubernetes and GCP.
   

  

 The platform is built in Python and integrates with tools like Celery, Argo, and Crossplane to provision and manage ML infrastructure. We are also evolving the platform architecture, including exploring multi-project GCP setups and expanding our client and CLI capabilities.
   

  

 What You’ll Do
   

  

* Design and build scalable Python services and APIs that power our ML platform
* Develop and evolve client tooling (Python SDK and upcoming CLI) to improve how users interact with the platform
* Work on orchestration and workflow systems using tools like Celery and Argo
* Contribute to platform architecture, including ongoing work around multi-project GCP setups and system design improvements
* Collaborate with ML engineers, data scientists, and other teams to build reliable, self-service workflows for ML use cases
* Take ownership of services end-to-end: design, implementation, deployment, and operation
* Contribute to infrastructure and platform reliability, working with Kubernetes and cloud-native systems
* Participate in code reviews, design discussions, and cross-team initiatives


 Who You Are
   

  

* Strong backend engineer with deep Python experience and a track record of building production systems
* Interested in platform engineering and building internal tools that other engineers rely on
* Comfortable working across the stack, from APIs and services to cloud infrastructure when needed
* Enjoy collaborating across teams and driving work that spans multiple domains
* Curious about ML platforms and how to enable others to build and run ML workloads effectively
* Experience with architectural decisions or technical leadership is a plus, but not a requirement


 Must-Have Skills
   

  

* Strong experience building backend services and APIs in Python
* Experience designing and operating distributed systems in production
* Familiarity with containerized environments and Kubernetes
* Experience working with cloud platforms (GCP is a plus, not required)
* Experience with asynchronous or workflow-based systems (e.g. Celery or Argo Events)
* Solid understanding of software engineering best practices (testing, CI/CD, observability)
* Fluent in English, with strong written and verbal communication skills


 Nice-to-Have Skills
   

  

* Experience with infrastructure orchestration tools like Crossplane or Terraform
* Exposure to ML platforms or tooling (e.g. MLFlow, Vertex AI, Dataproc)
* Experience working in environments with multiple cloud projects or multi-tenant systems
* Interest in improving developer experience and self-service platforms


**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Design Systems Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is redefining how legal work gets done. Not built for lawyers, built with them. We work alongside the world’s best legal teams, who expect excellence, precision, and speed, and we hold ourselves to the same bar.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace lets legal professionals move faster, think more clearly, and operate with sharper precision. By analysing thousands of documents in minutes and powering end-to-end workflows, we cut through complexity, teams can focus on what matters: judgment, strategy, and outcomes.
   

  

 1,000+ customers across 50+ countries trust us, including Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Linklaters, White & Case, Dentons, and Barclays. We’ve scaled to
 **$100M+ in ARR** 
 , with teams across Europe, North America and APAC, and continue to expand through acquisitions including Qura, Walter AI and Graceview.
   

  

 We partner with world-class performers: including Aaron Judge and the New York Yankees, Ludvig Åberg (and his caddie), and campaigns featuring Jude Law.
   

  

 Joining Legora means three things.
   

  

* We lean in: ownership over titles, outcomes over intentions.
* We fight for excellence: high standards, direct, ego-free feedback.
* We grow together: as a team and with our customers.


 Mission before ego. Everyone contributes. No one coasts.
   

  

 If you’re driven by impact, pace, and raising the bar. This is the place.
   

  

**The role**
 We're hiring a Design Systems Engineer to enable high-quality, lightning-fast implementation to support Legora’s rapid growth. You'll join our growing design team and work alongside our existing Design Systems Engineer to build the foundations that keep our UI consistent, accessible, and fast to ship. It's hands-on work, day to day with designers, engineers, and PMs in our Stockholm office.
   

  

 AI will reshape how frontend gets built. The right system, paired with the right tooling, will enable builders to move at lightning speed. You'll be the person making that real.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Build and maintain our React component library and token architecture
* Translate Figma designs into fast, reusable, accessible components
* Wire design and code together with Code Connect, Dev Mode, our MCP server, variables, and component properties
* Reduce drift between Figma and production through automation and tooling
* Standardize interaction patterns and UI architecture across the product
* Remove bottlenecks in design-to-code workflows and speed up delivery


**What You Bring**
* Strong experience with React, TypeScript, and modern frontend tooling
* Deep knowledge of design systems, tokens, and component architecture
* Hands-on experience with Figma's developer surface: Code Connect, Dev Mode, MCP, variables, REST API, plugins, component properties
* Sharp eye for detail and design precision
* A strong POV on what makes for an excellent product experience
* You lead by building. Your code simplifies, scales, and speeds up the work of everyone around you


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
EQT is looking for a Senior Platform Engineer to join our engineering platform team in Stockholm. This is a hands-on role for an experienced engineer who enjoys building reliable platforms, working closely with teams, and driving long-term impact.
   

  

**About The Engineering Platform Team**
 The engineering platform team builds and operates EQT’s core platform, enabling product teams to run secure, reliable, and scalable services, data-products and agentic ai. The team works closely with developers and security partners, with a strong focus on automation, standards, and operational excellence.
   

  

**About The Role**
 In this role, you will work across EQT’s engineering platform and lead the design and delivery of key platform initiatives. You will collaborate with teams across the organization to drive adoption, improve reliability, and enhance the developer experience.
   

  

* Lead the design, architecture, and rollout of platform projects from start to finish.
* Collaborate with engineers across the organization to align on platform standards and best practices.
* Operate and continuously improve the engineering platform.
* Contribute to on-call rotations and support platform reliability.
* Improve platform reliability, security, and developer experience.
* Support incident response, troubleshooting, and root cause analysis.


**About You**
 You enjoy working in a high-trust environment and take ownership of building strong technical foundations. You are collaborative, structured in your approach, and motivated by enabling others to succeed.
   

  

**Essential skills and experience:**
* Experience as a senior Platform, SRE, or Infrastructure Engineer.
* Proven experience leading platform projects from concept through to production.
* Hands-on experience running Kubernetes production environments.
* Experience working with cloud platforms, preferably Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* Experience with infrastructure as code, preferably Terraform.
* Familiarity with GitOps and CI/CD workflows.


 Tech Stack / Environment: GCP, GKE, ArgoCD, Gatekeeper, Cilium, Terraform, CircleCI, GitHub, Cloudflare, Datadog, incident.io, Snowflake, DBT, Hex, Go, Python, Next.js
   

  

**Nice to have:**
* Experience with platform security.
* Knowledge of authentication and identity systems.
* Strong networking knowledge across cloud and Kubernetes environments.
* Interest in the Agentic AI ecosystem
* Experience improving platform and production environment resilience.


**What We Offer**
 At EQT, you will work in a collaborative and high-trust environment where your ideas and contributions matter. You will have the opportunity to shape a modern engineering platform, work with experienced colleagues, and continue to grow your skills while delivering meaningful impact.
   

  

**Inclusion at** 
**EQT**
*Our vision for EQT employees is to build high performing & engaged teams. Our competitive edge comes from fostering an environment where every individual feels valued, empowered, and motivated to drive business impact. Our commitment to inclusion is not just about fairness; We understand and believe that being a great place to work drives the best performance.At EQT, inclusion is a business imperative and it's embedded into our talent strategy, decision-making, and culture to ensure that every individual and team operates at their full potential. By doing so, we unlock better collaboration, stronger innovation, and superior investment outcomes.*
**About EQT**
*EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization focused on active ownership strategies. With a Nordic heritage and a global mindset, EQT has a track record of over three decades of developing companies across multiple geographies, sectors and strategies. EQT has investment strategies covering all phases of a business’ development, from start-up to maturity. EQT has EUR ‌ 270 billion in total assets under management (EUR ‌ ‌141 billion in fee-generating assets under management), within two business segments – Private Capital and Real Assets.
   

  

 With its roots in the Wallenberg family’s entrepreneurial mindset and philosophy of long-term ownership, EQT is guided by a set of strong values and a distinct corporate culture. EQT manages and advises funds and vehicles that invest across the world with the mission to future-proof companies, generate attractive returns and make a positive impact with everything EQT does. EQT has offices in more than 25 countries across Europe, Asia and the Americas and has more than 1,900 employees.*
*More info: www.eqtgroup.com
   

  

 Follow EQT on LinkedIn, X, YouTube and Instagram*

title: AI Software Developer i Stockholm
description:
***Vi tror på- och vill förverkliga en AI- och datadriven framtid. Vi söker AI Software Developers som vill vara med och hjälpa våra kunder inom olika branscher att omvandla AI-experiment till skalbara, säkra och värdeskapande lösningar.***




  





 Hos oss blir du del av ett växande område med runt 20 konsulter inom Cloud, AI och systemutveckling. Samtidigt får du kollegor från hela Solita med expertis i allt från data, strategi och mycket mer att dela kunskap och perspektiv med, läs mer om det här.
 



  





 När vi växer gör dina möjligheter också det, du får vara med och påverka kulturen, affären och din roll.
 



  





**En dag på Solita** 




 En dag på Solita kan börja med ett standup-möte med ditt team på kunduppdraget, ibland består det av fler kollegor från Solita. Är det fredag kanske du jobbar från Solitas kontor i Stockholm för att starta dagen med frukost. Andra dagar jobbar du från kundens kontor eller hemifrån.
 



  





 Sen kliver du in i ditt arbete: när du stöter på ett problem söker du upp en lång diskussionstråd i slack med insikter från kollegor som haft samma problem. Andra gånger passar du på att fråga en kollega vid kaffemaskinen om deras perspektiv för att komma vidare. Du kan också delta i våra interna utbildningsmöten, där vi delar kunskap om allt från nya teknologier och arbetssätt till välmående. Vissa dagar avslutar du med AW, filmkväll, brädspel eller annan aktivitet du och kollegor tycker är kul.
 



  





**Din roll som AI Software Developer** 




 Du är med i hela utvecklingscykeln, inte sällan från tidigt pre-sales stadie eller i förstudier, för att utveckla, driftsätta och optimera agent-baserade och datadrivna system som hjälper kunder fatta bättre beslut eller automatisera processer på ett intelligent sätt. Exempelvis kan du arbeta med prompt optimering, designa och implementera RAG-arkitektur, utveckla AI-agenter, MCP-servrar, APIer och backend lösningar för att integrera befintliga system till LLM-tjänster. Läs mer om att jobba med AI på Solita här.
 



  





 Utöver moderna systemutveckling-tekniker kommer du arbeta med diverse AI-verktyg och ramverk som exempelvis LangChain, Tensorflow, AI Foundry och Semantic Kernel för att nämna några. Då vi jobbar teknikagnostiskt får du stor frihet att forma teknikval och arkitektur för att möta affärsbehov. Läs mer om hur kollegor jobbar och diskuterar kring olika teknikval i vår Dev blog här.
 



  





**Känner du igen dig i följande?** 




 Du kan kommunicera på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift. Det är ett plus om du varit konsult tidigare men det huvudsakliga är din förmåga att snabbt komma in i nya sammanhang och lära dig. Du är trygg i rollen tack vare din erfarenhet av både systemutveckling (särskilt om du jobbat i C# .NET eller Java Spring Boot) samt:
 


* RAG- eller AI-agentarkitektur
* Att bygga AI-drivna applikationer med moderna ramverk som ex. Semantic Kernel, LangChain eller liknande.
* Att implementera molnbaserade AI-tjänster och produktionssätta AI-lösningar med hjälp av DevSecOps och IaC.



  





 Vi letar inte bara efter tekniska skills, vi vill jobba med dig som tar ansvar för att bygga rätt lösningar på rätt sätt genom att utmana med omtanke. Du ser kod som ett hantverk, inte bara ett medel till funktion: du bryr dig om kvalitet, läsbarhet och hållbarhet. Du kommer trivas hos oss om du tycker om att dela med dig av din kunskap lika mycket som du är nyfiken på- och lyfter andras.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 Vår företagskultur är väldigt viktig för oss. Vi värdesätter låg hierarki, självständighet och ansvar, värdeskapande arbete och trevliga kollegor. Här kan du läsa mer om vår kultur, och här kan du bläddra bland våra tech-bloggar.
 


* **Meningsfulla projekt:** 
 Arbeta i en agil miljö där du kan påverka teknikval och arbetssätt för att skapa de bästa lösningarna
* **Flexibilitet och autonomi** 
 för att utforma ditt arbete med flextider– läs mer från vår blogg.
* **Ständig utveckling:** 
 Vi erbjuder kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling för att säkerställa att våra medarbetare ligger längst fram i teknikutvecklingen.
* **Innovativ kultur:** 
 Arbeta tillsammans med några av de främsta experterna inom data, analys och utveckling



  





 Utöver detta får du även ta del av följande
 **förmåner:** 




 💰 Fast lön oberoende av beläggningsgrad med möjlighet till löneväxling till ditt pensionssparande
 



 🏦 Pensionsavsättning i linje med ITP1 samt möjlighet till löneväxling till ditt pensionssparande vid inkomst över 8,07 inkomstbasbelopp
 



 🏖️ 30 semesterdagar
 



 😃 Sjukvårdsförsäkring för både din mentala och fysiska hälsa som täcker dig även utanför tjänstetid
 



 🏋️ Friskvårdsbidrag på 5000 kr via Benifex (tidigare Benify).
 



 💻 Ett brett nätverk av erfarna specialister från olika områden inom tech att samarbeta med
 



 🔗 Intern coach för att stödja ditt välbefinnande
 



 🪩 After Work och hobbyaktiviteter
 



 🥐 Fredagsfrukost
 



  





**Vilka är vi?** 




 Solita är ett värderingsstyrt konsultbolag med över 2000 medarbetare i 9 länder, varav ca 230 i Sverige. Vår storlek gör oss tillräckligt stora för att vara en stabil och innovativ arbetsgivare, men samtidigt tillräckligt små för att värna om våra medarbetare och kunder. Med bred kompetens inom digital transformation erbjuder vi en dynamisk arbetsmiljö. Hos oss får du friheten att utvecklas, både professionellt och personligt.
 



  





**Intresserad av att höra mer?** 




 Låter det som en spännande möjlighet? Skicka in din ansökan och bli en del av vårt team som ligger i framkant av AI-utveckling!
 



  





 Om du har några frågor, skriv gärna till Rebecca Hammel på LinkedIn eller mailadressen rebecca.hammel@solita.se. Du kan också kontakta rekryteringsansvarig, Louise Doverholt på LinkedIn eller mailadressen louise.doverholt@solita.se .
 



  





**Hur ser processen ut?** 




 I rekryteringsprocessen tror vi på en snabb och effektiv process. Du ansöker med CV eller LinkedIn och svarar på några korta frågor. Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande. Om vi ser en potentiell matchning, bjuder vi in dig till ett första möte för att lära känna dig och berätta mer om vår kultur och våra värderingar på Solita. I andra intervjun fokuserar vi på din tekniska kompetens och din erfarenhet. Om allt går bra tar vi oss vidare till sista steget där vi presenterar ett erbjudande och välkomnar dig som ny Solitan!

title: Sr Software Engineer, Android
description:
**The Company**
 PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for more than 25 years. Creating innovative experiences that make moving money, selling, and shopping simple, personalized, and secure, PayPal empowers consumers and businesses in approximately 200 markets to join and thrive in the global economy.
   

  

 We operate a global, two-sided network at scale that connects hundreds of millions of merchants and consumers. We help merchants and consumers connect, transact, and complete payments, whether they are online or in person. PayPal is more than a connection to third-party payment networks. We provide proprietary payment solutions accepted by merchants that enable the completion of payments on our platform on behalf of our customers.
   

  

 We offer our customers the flexibility to use their accounts to purchase and receive payments for goods and services, as well as the ability to transfer and withdraw funds. We enable consumers to exchange funds more safely with merchants using a variety of funding sources, which may include a bank account, a PayPal or Venmo account balance, PayPal and Venmo branded credit products, a credit card, a debit card, certain cryptocurrencies, or other stored value products such as gift cards, and eligible credit card rewards. Our PayPal, Venmo, and Xoom products also make it safer and simpler for friends and family to transfer funds to each other. We offer merchants an end-to-end payments solution that provides authorization and settlement capabilities, as well as instant access to funds and payouts. We also help merchants connect with their customers, process exchanges and returns, and manage risk. We enable consumers to engage in cross-border shopping and merchants to extend their global reach while reducing the complexity and friction involved in enabling cross-border trade.
   

  

 Our beliefs are the foundation for how we conduct business every day. We live each day guided by our core values of Inclusion, Innovation, Collaboration, and Wellness. Together, our values ensure that we work together as one global team with our customers at the center of everything we do – and they push us to ensure we take care of ourselves, each other, and our communities.
   

  

**Job Summary:**
 This job delivers complete solutions spanning all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC). It involves advising management on project-level issues, guiding junior engineers, operating with little supervision, and applying knowledge of technical best practices.
   

  

 In this role you will get the opportunity to work in App Experience team with skilled and high preforming engineers to deliver a world class experience for our users. You will tap into their years of delivery experience to turbo boost your learning so that you can help deliver exciting features and improvements to our Point-of-Sale App, to deliver a product that helps our merchants run their business.
   

  

**Job Description:**
**Essential Responsibilities:**
* Delivers complete solutions spanning all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) (design, implementation, testing, delivery and operations), based on definitions from more senior roles.
* Advises immediate management on project-level issues
* Guides junior engineers
* Operates with little day-to-day supervision, making technical decisions based on knowledge of internal conventions and industry best practices
* Applies knowledge of technical best practices in making decisions


**Minimum Qualifications:**
* 3+ years relevant experience and a Bachelor’s degree OR Any equivalent combination of education and experience.


**Additional Responsibilities & Preferred Qualifications:**
**Your day-to-day**
* You will focus on your learning while helping to deliver high quality solutions to our users.
* Collaborate with the team to define, design, and ship new features.
* You work closely with product to understand context and vision.
* You will learn and work with your peers in the Android chapter with improvements and increase learning opportunities for all in a supportive environment.
* You can bring your desire to innovate during and hack weeks and lab days on a bimonthly basis.


**What Do You Need To Bring**
* Solid experience in Android Development, with a strong command of Kotlin and the Android SDK.
* In-depth knowledge of Jetpack Compose and Android design and development patterns to create robust, scalable, and maintainable applications.
* A user-centered design mindset, aiming to create products that are intuitive to use and impactful for customers.
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and automation tools to streamline the build, test, and deployment process.
* Familiarity with Agile methodologies, working collaboratively across the cross-functional team to deliver value in iterations.
* Effective communication and collaboration skills, with an eagerness to learn from team members, share your insights, and collaborate with stakeholders outside of the team.
* Proven expertise in automated testing to ensure high-quality code for production environments.


**Subsidiary:**
 PayPal
   

  

**Travel Percent:**
 0
   

  

 PayPal does not charge candidates any fees for courses, applications, resume reviews, interviews, background checks, or onboarding. When making an application directly, we will never ask you to share passwords, one-time passcodes (OTP), or verification codes. Any such request is a red flag and likely part of a scam. All communication regarding your application will come from official PayPal email domains. If you suspect fraudulent activity, please report it immediately. To learn more about how to identify and avoid recruitment fraud please visit https://careers.pypl.com/contact-us.
   

  

 For the majority of employees, PayPal's balanced hybrid work model offers 3 days in the office for effective in-person collaboration and 2 days at your choice of either the PayPal office or your home workspace, ensuring that you equally have the benefits and conveniences of both locations.
   

  

**Our Benefits:**
 At PayPal, we’re committed to building an equitable and inclusive global economy. And we can’t do this without our most important asset-you. That’s why we offer comprehensive, choice-based programs, to support all aspects of personal wellbeing—physical, emotional, and financial—delivering meaningful value where it matters most. We strive to create a flexible, balanced work culture with a holistic approach to benefits, including generous paid time off, healthcare coverage for you and your family, and resources to create financial security and support your mental health.
   

  

**Who We Are:**
 Click Here to learn more about our culture and community.
   

  

**Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 PayPal provides equal employment opportunity (EEO) to all persons regardless of age, color, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, race, religion, creed, gender, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, genetic information, marital status, status with regard to public assistance, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law. In addition, PayPal will provide reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities. If you are unable to submit an application because of incompatible assistive technology or a disability, please contact us at paypalglobaltalentacquisition@paypal.com.
   

  

**Belonging at PayPal:**
 Our employees are central to advancing our mission, and we strive to create an environment where everyone can do their best work with a sense of purpose and belonging. Belonging at PayPal means creating a workplace with a sense of acceptance and security where all employees feel included and valued. We are proud to have a diverse workforce reflective of the merchants, consumers, and communities that we serve, and we continue to take tangible actions to cultivate inclusivity and belonging at PayPal.
   

  

 Any general requests for consideration of your skills, please Join our Talent Community.
   

  

 We know the confidence gap and imposter syndrome can get in the way of meeting spectacular candidates. Please don’t hesitate to apply.

title: Principal Platform Engineer
description:
**Mission**
 Neko is redefining what prevention means, from treating illness when it arrives, to sustaining health before it's ever at risk. Our mission: make data-driven, preventative care accessible to more people, before symptoms appear.
   

  

 In a single, non-invasive visit under an hour, proprietary technology and direct clinical care combine to deliver personalised, actionable insights. It's a team that thinks in 10x, not 10%. Every role here plays a part in building a world where prevention is the norm, and where your work genuinely helps people live longer, healthier lives.
   

  

**The Role**
 This is a 0→1 build. You'll own the architecture, build and rollout of Neko's internal AI developer platform, shaping how our engineers design, ship and operate software through agentic, AI-assisted workflows.
   

  

 It's a hands-on technical leadership role. You'll be the person setting long-term direction for AI agents, tooling and the systems underneath them, while also doing the work. The expectation is that what you build gets used across teams and meaningfully changes how engineering happens here.
   

  

**What You'll Deliver**
*In the first 6 months*
* A clear architectural direction for the platform
* Initial components shipped and adopted by early teams
* Measurable improvements to developer speed, reliability and autonomy
* Genuine organic adoption across engineering, driven by value not mandate


*By month 12*
* A substantive shift toward agentic, engineer-led development workflows
* Platform scaled beyond pilot groups to multiple teams
* Clear ownership models for agents, tooling and supporting systems
* Long-term architecture defined and moving toward maturity


**What We're Looking For**
*Must-haves*
* Proven experience building and shipping an internal developer platform, hands-on, not advisory
* A strong track record leading agentic or AI-assisted development work that engineers actually use day-to-day
* Real backend engineering depth with production systems, recent Java or C# strongly preferred
* Experience rolling out platform tooling to 20-30+ developers with meaningful adoption
* Expertise with workflow engines such as AWS Step Functions, Azure Durable Functions, Temporal, Conductor or Dagster
* The ability to drive change through influence and credibility, not positional authority
* 10-15+ years of engineering experience with substantial platform ownership


*Nice to have*
* Full-stack exposure, though backend depth is the priority
* Background in product-led SaaS or organisations with strong internal developer tooling culture


**About Titles At Neko**
 We use a simplified internal title framework that prioritises clarity over hierarchy, so internal titles may differ from market‑facing role titles. Scope, impact and level of the role are fully aligned and will be clearly discussed throughout the process.
   

  

**Hiring Process**
 Candidates progress from application and structured screening through thoughtfully designed interviews culminating in a formal offer and final pre-employment checks before joining the team.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity & Inclusion Statement**
 Neko Health is committed to inclusive hiring and member-first care. We welcome candidates from all backgrounds and encourage you to request reasonable adjustments to support your application.

title: Digital Business Developer
description:
We’re if insurance and we give people confidence today to shape their tomorrow! Our unit, Mobility, works with car insurance and everything that can help you when you have had an accident with your car. We are now looking for a Digital Business Developer to join our team of Digital Product and Service Experts and we’re hoping that it’s you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You will be part of the Mobility Tribe working on improving our digital services and products. You will contribute to the work in your Squad (agile team), collect business requirements, research the user needs, help prioritize the initiatives and be the stakeholders point of contact.
   

  

**About The Team**
 Most of your day to day work will happen within the Tribe. Partly with stakeholders and partly with your agile squad. When it comes to reporting lines, you will be part of a group of Digital Business Developers reporting to the Mobility Tribe Business Owner. We all work to make car insurance a little bit more hustle free and smooth.
   

  

 What can we offer you?
   

  

 If is a good place to work. We strive for a healthy balance between work and personal life, and we take care of each other.
   

  

 Some of the benefits we enjoy as employees at if include:
   

  

- An including work environment where everyone is welcome

- Social activities, as well as highly skilled professional environment

- Possibility of hybrid work (3 days at office/week)

 Health promoting workplace with e.g., wellness allowance and various sports activities (+ a towel service at our Stockholm office gym
 - Great insurance benefits

- Lunch bonus

- Pension saving plan

 Who are you?
   

  

 You have previous experience from working with digital products, preferably from a larger organization with high complexity and dependencies. You’re used to managing stakeholder expectations and communication as well as participating in continuously improving the way of working. You are opinionated and express your ideas and thoughts, but you’re also a good listener.
   

  

 If you’ve worked within finance or insurance previously that is a big plus, but not a must. In this role it’s necessary to speak English fluently and if you’re also familiar with one of the Nordic languages, it will give you an advantage.
   

  

 These are some personal traits we think you might recognize in yourself:
   

  

* You care about the wellbeing of others and yourself
* You have a strong moral compass
* You like working together with others but can also take on tasks yourself
* You like to solve problems and complexity gets you excited
* You like to grow your network and use it to solve problems
* You get stuff done.


 Applications and more information
   

  

**Application deadline** 
 : 8 of June 2026
   

**To apply for the position** 
 : Please submit your application and attach your CV using the link in this add.
   

  

**Worklocation:** 
 This role is open in all major offices in the Nordic countries.
   

**Travelling:** 
 Some travelling is required.
   

  

 If you have any questions you’re welcome to reach out to the recruiting manager Sandra Backer at sandra.backer@if.se or to our
   

  

*Please note that we are
 **not** 
 looking for consultants or recruiting firms at this point.*

title: Staff Engineer | Group Operations
description:
**Every parcel we deliver starts with an engineering decision**
 At Instabee, we don't just move parcels — we solve some of the most complex physical-world problems in European logistics, at scale. From the algorithms that optimize a driver's route to the systems that predict terminal throughput hours in advance, our engineering decisions have a direct impact on millions of deliveries every day.
   

  

 We're now looking for a Staff Engineer to join our technical leadership group — someone who doesn't just write great code, but shapes how entire teams think, build, and deliver.
   

  

**About The Role**
 This isn't a traditional engineering role. As a Staff Engineer in Group Operations, you sit at the intersection of technical strategy and real-world logistics. You work alongside Product and Engineering Management to ensure multiple teams are building the right things, in the right way, at the right scale.
   

  

 Think of yourself as the technical glue — the person who bridges business ambition and engineering execution, who spots the hard problems before they become expensive ones, and who raises the bar for the entire engineering organization around you.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Drive Technical Strategy & Architecture Set the technical direction across multiple teams in Operations. You'll guide engineers toward right-sized solutions — balancing high-scale stability with the speed needed to move the needle on operational KPIs.
* Tackle Genuinely Hard Problems Forecasting incoming parcel volumes, optimizing terminal throughput, routing thousands of drivers in real time — these are the kinds of challenges that define our business and your days.
* Champion Developer Experience Identify and eliminate technical friction. You'll lead initiatives to improve testing environments and deployment speed, keeping our engineering organization sharp and efficient.
* Bridge Business & Tech Translate complex business requirements into evolvable technical designs. You'll help teams understand how their code directly impacts the P&L of our logistics network — and why that matters.
* Mentor & Build Culture Act as a role model for the engineering community. You'll mentor senior engineers, promote a culture of learning from failure, and foster cross-team collaboration to ensure we don't reinvent the wheel.
* Enable Data-Driven Decisions Work closely with Data and Product teams to ensure our systems produce high-quality insights that power company-wide decisions.


**What We're Looking For**
 You don't need to be an expert in everything your teams do — but you should care deeply about helping them succeed. Since the teams you'll be leading work across both software engineering and data science, we're looking for someone who is comfortable in both worlds. We think you'll thrive in this role if you are:
   

  

* A Leader with Dual Competencies — You have a background in maths, forecasting, or ML, yet have spent years building robust, production-grade software systems. You're as comfortable discussing model accuracy as you are system reliability.
* A Technical Leader — You have broad experience building distributed systems and can navigate deep technical dives and high-level architectural trade-offs with equal confidence.
* Strategic & Pragmatic — You know that "perfect is the enemy of good." You favor an iterative mindset, delivering value early and often rather than waiting for the ideal solution.
* Operationally Curious — You're fascinated by the intersection of software and physical operations. Experience in logistics, routing, or hardware integration is a significant plus.
* A Communicator & Collaborator — You can translate complex technical concepts for non-technical stakeholders and thrive in a cross-functional environment where engineering, product, and business work closely together toward shared goals.
* A Quality Advocate — You hold a high bar for stability and security — but you know how to achieve it without killing the pace of innovation.


**Why join Instabee?**
 You won’t just be another employee here; you’ll be a builder. We offer the chance to sharpen your skills alongside some of the brightest minds in the industry. If you’re someone who sees an inefficient process and thinks, "I can make that better," you’re going to love it here.
   

  

**The Perks**
 🌇 The Best View in Town Our Stockholm HQ offers a stunning 360-degree panorama.
   

  

 🐶 Dog-Friendly Culture No need to leave your best friend at home; our furry friends have their own floor!
   

  

 🏓 Unwind & Recharge Whether it's a competitive game of Foosball or a Karaoke solo, we take our fun seriously.
   

  

 👶 Family First We support our new parents with six months of parental pay.
   

  

 🎂 Birthday Gift Enjoy a fully paid day off to celebrate another trip around the sun.
   

  

 ⏰ Work-Life Harmony Hybrid working and flexible hours come as standard.
   

  

**The Journey So Far**
 Instabee was born when two pioneers, Budbee and Instabox, joined forces. Today, we are on a mission to become the leading European e-commerce enabler. We are a high-speed business, expanding across borders and constantly evolving. As our journey grows in scale and complexity, we need people like you to help us navigate the road ahead.
   

  

*This recruitment process consists of background checks via Verifiera as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.*
 Instabee Group, with consumer-facing brands Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy, brings together years of experience in delivery. Today, Instabee Group is present in five markets, serving thousands of online merchants and millions of consumers with seamless home deliveries and convenient parcel locker deliveries, using the best fuel available. With smart technology, a strong focus on sustainability, and a secure supply chain, Instabee has become a trusted partner for online merchants and a preferred choice for consumers.

title: Senior .NET Developer – Stockholm
description:
Är du en systemutvecklare inom .NET som inte bara skriver kod, utan utvecklar lösningar som håller och utvecklas över tid? På Solita vill vi också något mer, vi tar initiativ, samarbetar och utforskar för att skapa en AI- och datadriven framtid.
 



  





 Som Senior .NET Developer blir du del av ett växande område med runt 20 konsultkollegor inom cloud, AI och systemutveckling. Samtidigt får du kollegor från hela Solita med expertis i allt från data, strategi och mycket mer att dela kunskap och perspektiv med, läs mer om det här och ta del av insikter från utvecklare på Solita i vår Dev blog här.
 



  





**En dag på Solita** 




 En dag på Solita kan börja med ett standup-möte med teamet på kunduppdraget, ibland består det av fler kollegor från Solita. Är det fredag kanske du jobbar från Solita kontoret på Lästmakargatan i Stockholm för att starta dagen med frukost. Andra dagar jobbar du från kundens kontor eller hemifrån.
 



  





 När du stöter på ett problem i ditt arbete söker du upp en lång diskussionstråd i slack med insikter från kollegor som haft samma problem. Andra gånger passar du på att fråga en kollega vid kaffemaskinen om deras perspektiv för att komma vidare. Du kan också delta i interna utbildningsmöten där vi delar kunskap om allt från nya tekniker och arbetssätt till välmående. Vissa dagar avslutar du med AW, brädspel, filmkväll eller annan aktivitet du och kollegor tycker är kul.
 



  





**Din roll som Senior .NET Developer** 




 I rollen som Senior .NET Developer är du ofta med från idé till produktion i uppdrag hos organisationer inom alla möjliga branscher, från sjukvård till e-handel, transport och energi. Det roligaste med rollen enligt din framtida kollega Ulrika är “
 *att få kombinera teknik och problemlösning: förstå hur olika delar hänger ihop, bygga något som verkligen används, och se helheten fungera i praktiken.* 
 ”
 



  





 Du kan exempelvis vara med och modernisera och migrera en plattform, utveckla nya datadrivna produkter eller optimera systemutvecklingsprocessen med implementationer av AI- eller automationslösningar.
 



  





 Vi ser AI som en given del av systemutvecklarrollen, vår förväntan är att du delar den synen och vill utvecklas inom AI så kan vi bidra med verktygen. Från exempelvis interna utbildningar & hackaton, certifieringar, agentbaserade AI-verktyg för kodning (däribland våra egenutvecklade AI-acceleratorer som ex. FunctionAI & RoadCrewAO) till möjlighet att lära dig hands-on i uppdrag med erfarna kollegor.
 



  





**Känner du igen dig i följande?** 




 Du kan kommunicera på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift. Det är ett plus om du varit konsult tidigare, det avgörande är din förmåga att snabbt komma in i nya sammanhang och lära dig. Tack vare flera års erfarenhet av att bygga moderna lösningar genom hela utvecklingscykeln, främst i C# .NET, känner du dig trygg i rollen då du fått med dig:
 



  




* Vana att jobba med distribuerade system och eventdriven, skalbar arkitektur. Gärna med tekniker som Kafka, RabbitMQ eller Azure Service Bus.
* God förståelse för Dev(Sec)Ops-principer, CI/CD och orkestrering.
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar som Azure, AWS eller GCP. Har du jobbat med containerization (Kubernetes, Docker) eller Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Pulumi, Bicep) är det en extra tillgång.
* Nyfikenhet på AI i utvecklingsarbetet: hur verktyg som GitHub Copilot, OpenAI API:er eller ML-integrerade pipelines kan göra kodningen smartare och effektivare.



  





 Vi letar inte bara efter tekniska skills, vi vill jobba med dig som tar ansvar för att bygga rätt lösningar på rätt sätt genom att utmana med omtanke. Du ser kod som ett hantverk, inte bara ett medel till funktion: du bryr dig om kvalitet, läsbarhet och hållbarhet. Du kommer trivas hos oss om du tycker om att dela med dig av din kunskap lika mycket som du är nyfiken på- och lyfter andras.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 Vår företagskultur är väldigt viktig för oss. Vi värdesätter låg hierarki, självständighet och ansvar, värdeskapande arbete och trevliga kollegor. Här kan du läsa mer om vår kultur, och här kan du bläddra bland våra tech-bloggar.
 


* **Meningsfulla projekt:** 
 Arbeta i en agil miljö där du kan påverka teknikval och arbetssätt för att skapa de bästa lösningarna
* **Flexibilitet och autonomi** 
 för att utforma ditt arbete med flextider– läs mer från vår blogg här.
* **Ständig utveckling:** 
 Vi erbjuder kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling för att säkerställa att våra medarbetare ligger längst fram i teknikutvecklingen.
* **Innovativ kultur:** 
 Arbeta tillsammans med några av de främsta experterna inom data, analys och utveckling – läs mer i bloggen här.



  





 Utöver detta får du även ta del av följande
 **förmåner** 
 :
 



 💰 Fast lön oberoende av beläggningsgrad med möjlighet till löneväxling till ditt pensionssparande
 



 🏦 Pensionsavsättning i linje med ITP1 samt möjlighet till löneväxling till ditt pensionssparande vid inkomst över 8,07 inkomstbasbelopp
 



 🏖️ 30 semesterdagar
 



 🏥 Sjukvårdsförsäkring för både din mentala och fysiska hälsa som täcker dig även utanför tjänstetid
 



 🏋️ Friskvårdsbidrag på 5000 kr via Benifex (tidigare Benify)
 



 🔗 Intern coach för att stödja ditt välbefinnande
 



 🪩 After Work och hobbyaktiviteter
 



 🥐 Fredagsfrukost
 



  





**Vilka är vi?** 




 Solita är ett värderingsstyrt konsultbolag med över 2200 medarbetare i 9 länder, varav ca 230 i Sverige. Vår storlek gör oss tillräckligt stora för att vara en stabil och innovativ arbetsgivare, men samtidigt tillräckligt små för att värna om våra medarbetare och kunder. Med bred kompetens inom digital transformation erbjuder vi en dynamisk arbetsmiljö. Hos oss får du friheten att utvecklas, både professionellt och personligt.
 



  





**Intresserad av att höra mer?** 




 Låter det som en intressant möjlighet? Skicka in din ansökan och bli en del av vårt team som ligger i framkant inom systemutveckling!
 



  





 Om du har några frågor, skriv gärna till Rebecca Hammel på LinkedIn eller via mail till rebecca.hammel@solita.se. Du kan också kontakta rekryteringsansvarig, Louise Doverholt på LinkedIn eller via mail till louise.doverholt@solita.se .
 



  





**Hur ser processen ut?** 




 I rekryteringsprocessen tror vi på en snabb och effektiv process. Du ansöker med CV eller LinkedIn och svarar på några korta frågor. Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande. Om vi ser en potentiell matchning, bjuder vi in dig till ett första möte för att lära känna dig och berätta mer om vår kultur och våra värderingar på Solita. I andra intervjun fokuserar vi på din tekniska kompetens och din erfarenhet. Om allt går bra tar vi oss vidare till sista steget där vi presenterar ett erbjudande och välkomnar dig som ny Solitan!
