title: AI Workforce Sales Specialist
description:
**Overview**
 We are looking for a high-energy, customer-focused AI Workforce Sales Specialist to drive digital transformation conversations with enterprise customers. In this role, you will engage directly with business stakeholders, identify opportunities, and translate them into impactful solutions leveraging Microsoft’s modern workplace and AI portfolio.This is an individual contributor role focused on driving business impact through consultative selling, strong execution, and collaboration across teams and partners.
   

  

 Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead customer conversations on digital transformation, identifying business needs and shaping opportunities that convert into qualified deals
* Build trusted relationships with business stakeholders and guide them through solution adoption, effectively positioning the value of Microsoft solutions (e.g. M365, Copilot, Entra, productivity platforms)
* Own and execute a clear territory and account plan, driving pipeline creation through proactive prospecting and engagement
* Deliver predictable revenue by managing opportunities end-to-end, working closely with account teams to execute with speed and discipline
* Demonstrate strong market and competitive awareness, positioning Microsoft’s value confidently in customer engagements
* Act as a trusted advisor and solution expert, contributing insights, sharing best practices, and helping elevate overall team execution


**Qualifications**
**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business or related field AND a couple years experience in sales or customer-facing roles, ideally in enterprise or technology environments
* Strong ability to engage business stakeholders and translate needs into solutions
* Demonstrated track record of building pipeline and closing deals
* Fluent in English and Swedish


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with cloud platforms or enterprise software (e.g. Microsoft 365, Copilot, Azure)
* Background in consultative or solution-based sales
* Familiarity with competitors
* Strong stakeholder management and storytelling skills


 This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.
   

  

 Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process, read more about
 **requesting accommodations.**

title: Solution Architect for IT Corporate
description:
Do you want to shape the future architecture of Corporate IT in a business-critical transformation?
   

  

 We are looking for a senior Solution Architect who can define target architecture, guide strategic direction, and connect business needs with sustainable technology choices for corporate data platform and financial reporting.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Solution Architect in the Corporate area, you play a key role in setting the architectural direction across corporate domains such as Finance, HR, and Risk. A central responsibility of this role is to define and drive the architecture of the Corporate Data Platform, supporting ERP transformation and enabling financial and enterprise reporting across domains. This includes ensuring clear principles for how data is shared and governed.
   

  

 You work closely with business stakeholders, product teams, and engineering to ensure that solutions align with target architecture, business priorities, and long-term sustainability. The primary focus of this role is to ensure that the Corporate Data Platform effectively supports financial reporting and broader enterprise reporting needs in a scalable and governed way.
   

  

**Your Responsibilities**
 As a Solution Architect in Corporate, you will:
   

  

* Define and evolve target architecture for the Corporate area
* Translate business goals into architectural direction and solution design principles
* Drive alignment across teams and domains, ensuring consistency and reuse
* Communicate architectural decisions, trade-offs, and risks to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
* Ensure that data architecture supports financial and enterprise reporting requirements, including consistency, quality, and reuse
* Guide and support teams without being the primary implementer
* Contribute to architectural governance, principles, and decision frameworks
* Collaborate with the wider architecture community to ensure alignment across If


 We offer
   

  

 In the same way that we place high demands on you as an employee, we also expect you to place high demands on us as an employer. Here are some of the benefits of working at If:
   

  

* An including work environment where everyone is welcome
* Career and development opportunities in the biggest insurance company in the Nordics
* Social activities, as well as highly skilled professional environment
* Possibility of hybrid workplace
* Health promoting workplace with e.g., wellness allowance and various sports activities
* Great insurance benefits
* High pension savings


 Why join our team?
   

  

 IT Corporate is a Nordic/Baltic IT unit with around 60 employees. To strengthen our support for ongoing business and technology transformation, we are now looking for a Solution Architect to help design and establish our Corporate Data Platform, built on Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Azure services.
   

  

 You will be part of the IT Corporate Architecture team, working closely with corporate units such as Accounting, Financial Reporting, Cash Management, Marketing, Legal, HR, and Risk. The Corporate Architecture unit is part of If’s centralized IT Architecture organization.
   

  

 We work closely with business and engineering teams on large, cross-cutting initiatives and are actively transforming the IT landscape of the Corporate area. Our mission is to build a modern and sustainable tech landscape that delivers stable, high-quality solutions and enables business transformation — particularly within the CFO area and financial reporting.
   

  

**About You**
 You are a senior architect with strong communication skills and a proven ability to create alignment across both business and IT.
   

  

 You are comfortable working at a strategic level, defining direction while also supporting teams in making the right decisions. You can explain complex topics in a clear and structured way and build trust with stakeholders across the organization.
   

  

 You bring a holistic perspective, understanding how architecture, data, and business processes come together to support long-term transformation.
   

  

 We believe that you
   

  

* Experience defining and driving architecture for data platforms, preferably supporting financial or enterprise reporting
* Proven ability to define and drive target architecture and architectural roadmaps
* Experience working close to business stakeholders, ideally within finance or corporate functions
* Strong understanding of data and integration concepts in enterprise environments
* Experience working across multiple teams and domains in large-scale transformations


 We also consider it an advantage if you have experience from the insurance sector or banking, and have an understanding of financial processes and financial reporting.
   

  

**Our promise to you**
 You will work in a highly relevant area with strong business impact, be part of a professional architecture community, and have both freedom and accountability in your role — supported by experienced peers and leaders.
   

  

**Additional Facts And Recruitment Process**
**Application deadline:** 
 Screening and interviewing will be ongoing from the start. However, deadline to apply is 2026-06-10.
   

**To apply for the position:** 
 Please attach your CV. We kindly ask you to fill out the questionnaires instead of attaching a personal letter.
   

**Work location:** 
 Bergshamra, Stockholm
   

**Travelling:** 
 The team is distributed across several offices so occasional travel is part of the role.
   

  

**Start:** 
 As soon as possible/by agreement.
   

  

 For more information regarding the position, please contact Anna Ryding, e-mail: anna.ryding@if.se
   

  

 Headhunting and consultancy firms are humbly prompted not to respond to this job ad!
   

  

*Background checks will be done in accordance with the law in the country of employment.*

title: Research Scientist - Music
description:
We are seeking a Research Scientist to join our Artist-First AI Music lab. Our team pioneers and advances state-of-the-art generative technologies for music that create breakthrough experiences for fans and artists. We invent entirely new listening experiences that center and celebrate artists and creatives. All of our products will put artists and songwriters first, through these four principles:
   

  

**Partnerships with record labels, distributors, and music publishers:** 
 We’ll develop new products for artists and fans through upfront agreements, not by asking for forgiveness later.
   

  

**Choice in participation:** 
 We recognize there’s a wide range of views on use of generative music tools within the artistic community. Therefore, artists and rightsholders will choose if and how to participate to ensure the use of AI tools aligns with the values of the people behind the music.
   

  

**Fair compensation and new revenue:** 
 We will build products that create wholly new revenue streams for rightsholders, artists, and songwriters, ensuring they are properly compensated for uses of their work and transparently credited for their contributions.
   

  

**Artist-fan connection:** 
 AI tools we develop will not replace human artistry. They will give artists new ways to be creative and connect with fans. We will leverage our role as the place where more than 700 million people already come to listen to music every month to ensure that generative AI deepens artist-fan connections.
   

  

 For more information, see this press release: https://newsroom.spotify.com/2025-10-16/artist-first-ai-music-spotify-collaboration/
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Conduct ground breaking research in music generation (diffusion, flow matching, or autoregressive models), as well as related domains like ML-based audio processing, music information retrieval, machine learning, and signal processing.
* Run large-scale experiments with access to Spotify’s extensive infrastructure and an audience of more than 700 million monthly active users.
* Create practical applications that harness generative technologies, pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in listening experiences.
* Collaborate as part of a cross-functional team—working closely with scientists, engineers, product managers, designers, user researchers, and analysts—to craft innovative solutions to complex challenges.
* Have a direct impact on Spotify’s products, tools, and services, working on projects that influence the entire organization.
* Engage with the broader research community by publishing your findings, delivering talks, and attending top conferences.


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have a Ph.D. degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, Engineering, or a related field. Previous industry experience is helpful.
* You have experience in one or more of the following fields: generative modeling, machine learning, music information retrieval, speech processing, audio processing, signal processing, probabilistic modeling, computer vision, or related areas.
* You have publications in communities such as ICASSP, ISMIR, INTERSPEECH, ICLR, AAAI, IJCAI, NeurIPS, ICML, CVPR, ECCV, ICCV, or related.
* You have strong coding skills in the following languages/libraries: Python, PyTorch, NumPy.
* You are a creative problem solver who is passionate about building outstanding products that add real value to millions of people.
* You are enthusiastic about learning more about turning research ideas into products operating at scale.
* You can explain complex topics in simple terms, and you enjoy building strong relationships with colleagues and stakeholders.


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! For this role, you can be within the EMEA region as long as we have a work location
* This team operates within the Central European and GMT time zone for collaboration.
* Core working hours are CET 3pm-6pm / EST 9am-12pm.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: DevOps Cloud Platform Engineer
description:
**A unique career in aviation technology**
 Looking for a role where cloud infrastructure, automation, and software reliability meet the world of aviation?
   

  

 At
 **DynamicSource** 
 , we develop software systems and applications for the aviation industry. Our products support airlines, pilots, and aviation companies in running safer, more efficient, and more reliable operations.
   

  

 As a
 **DevOps Cloud Platform Engineer** 
 , you will play a key role in maintaining and improving the infrastructure behind our products. You will work with cloud services, deployment pipelines, automation, monitoring, security, and performance optimization — making sure our systems are stable, scalable, and ready to support a demanding industry.
   

  

 This is not a generic infrastructure role. Aviation is a safety-conscious and operationally complex domain, where reliability, structure, and attention to detail matter. You will work closely with developers and domain experts to improve how we build, deploy, and operate our software.
   

  

 You will join a skilled and focused team with a strong interest in both technology and aviation. We value ownership, practical problem-solving, and the ability to work independently in a remote-friendly setup.
   

  

 More information about DynamicSource is available at:
   

  

 https://www.dynamicsource.se/
   

  

**Your role**
 As part of our team, you will:
   

  

* Maintain, deploy, and improve our cloud infrastructure
* Work with Infrastructure as Code using Terraform and Ansible
* Support and improve deployment pipelines and release processes
* Monitor, tune, and optimize system performance
* Identify, evaluate, and implement new technologies and solutions
* Improve reliability, security, automation, and operational efficiency
* Collaborate with developers to support stable and efficient delivery
* Take ownership of infrastructure-related tasks and improvements


**Skills And Experience**
 We are looking for someone with experience in:
   

  

* Infrastructure as Code, Terraform and Ansible
* Linux administration
* Cloud infrastructure and production environments
* General IT security and secure infrastructure practices
* Automation, scripting, and operational tooling
* Working independently and staying well-organised in a hybrid or remote setup


 You should be self-driven, disciplined, and comfortable taking responsibility for systems that need to run reliably.
   

  

**Good to have**
 Experience with any of the following is a plus:
   

  

* AWS services such as EC2, ECS, RDS, and ALB
* Kubernetes
* Node.js, Python, PHP, Bash, or object-oriented programming
* CI/CD tools such as Jenkins
* Monitoring, logging, and observability tools
* Aviation systems, airline operations, or a general interest in aviation


**Work model and travel**
 For this position, a
 **hybrid work model** 
 applies. You are expected to work from our office in Stockholm at least
 **2 days per week** 
 . The majority of the DynamicSource team is located in the greater Stockholm area.
   

  

 DynamicSource also visits customers and participates in industry events such as forums, product expos, and aviation-related conferences. Some international travel may be required.

title: Quality Assurance Engineer
description:
**About Hailey** 
 🩷
 



 During the spring of 2020 Hailey HR was founded. We're a Swedish SaaS HR-tech company that want to digitalise, simplify and modernise the HR industry with our HR-system - join us on our journey!
 



  





**About the position** 
 💼
 



 As our next QA Engineer, you'll work within our development team alongside frontend and backend developers. Your focus is on making sure what we build actually holds up - through structured testing, automation, and a sharp eye for details.
 



  





 You'll design and validate test cases, build automated API and end-to-end tests, and do exploratory testing with a genuine interest in finding what others might miss. When bugs appear, you report them, follow the fix, and verify the result. You'll also work with customers and our Customer Success team to investigate issues raised by real users - keeping the feedback loop short between what's reported and what gets resolved.
 



  





**What are we looking for:** 



* Post-secondary education in relevant area.
* Understanding of JavaScript and HTML, and a genuine interest in programming and software development.
* Interest in test automation and passionate about quality, automation, and modern test strategies, patterns and frameworks.
* Full professional fluency in Swedish and strong English skills, both spoken and written.



  





**We believe you are:** 



* Flexible, innovative and curious, and thrive in a dynamic environment where solutions are always open to discussion.
* Detail-oriented with a strong eye for accuracy.
* Loving table tennis! (or at least find it okay, it’s a part of the culture after all
 **🏓** 
 )



  





**What you will learn/might already know:** 



* Test automation tools and frameworks
* Application Insights and other monitoring tools
* Designing structured test cases
* QA as part of CI/CD pipelines



  





**More information:** 




**Scope:** 
 100%
 



**Start:** 
 September 2026
 



**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden (on-site)
 



  





 We’re looking forward to your application! 👋💌

title: Erfarna konsulter sökes
description:
Är du en dedikerad problemlösare som älskar att förstå kundernas verkliga behov? Drömmer du om att hjälpa ledande bolag i Sverige och vara en drivkraft för deras framgång? Gillar du att kavla upp ärmarna och jobba tillsammans med kunder i strategiska förändringar? Då kan du vara precis den person vi letar efter för att förstärka vårt växande team som hjälper våra kunder att lyckas med sina transformationer!
 



  





**Ambientos affärsidé?** 




 Vi är ett Stockholmsbaserat konsultbolag som specialiserat oss på att stötta våra kunder i deras större transformationer. Vi verkar i en omvärld med snabba förändringar där våra kunders perspektiv, situation och miljö är utgångspunkten i allt vi gör.
 



 Vi hjälper organisationer att genomföra komplexa förändringsinitiativ där processer, system och teknik utvecklas tillsammans, där fokus ligger på effektivitet, kvalitet och långsiktigt värde.
 



 I våra uppdrag sitter vi på kundens sida och bidrar med erfarenhet, perspektiv och genomförandekraft i deras högst prioriterade, strategiska transformationer.
 



  





**Vi söker nya kollegor** 




 Vi söker löpande personer med gedigen kunskap inom CRM, e-handel, supply chain och finans. Just nu har våra kunder ett extra behov av arkitekter, testledare och projektledare som kombinerar teknisk kompetens med bransch- och processförståelse.
 



 För arkitektrollerna söker vi dig som har ett tekniskt eller funktionellt djup och som idag har en roll som arkitekt inom CRM, e-handel, integration eller ERP eller dig som ser arkitektrollen som ditt nästa karriärsteg.
 



 Vi värdesätter:
 



  





 ·      Erfarenhet av större digitala transformationsprogram
 



 ·      Konsultbakgrund, gärna erfarenhet från större IT- eller Managementkonsultföretag
 



 ·      Erfarenhet av relevanta affärsprocesser och branscher. Gärna retail, dagligvaruhandel eller industri
 



 ·      ERP kompetens, gärna med erfarenhet av SAP
 



 ·      Erfarenhet av både B2C- som B2B-tillämpningar
 



 ·      Starkt driv och en bra lagspelare
 



 ·      Erfarenhet och förmåga att ta ägarskap och leda initiativ
 



 ·      Nätverk och relationer inom ditt specialistområde
 



 ·      Högskoleexamen inom relevant område
 



 ·      Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift är ett krav
 



  





 Tror du att du passar du in på Ambiento och vill bli en del i vårt växande team, kontakta oss via Karl Hjalmarsson karl.hjalmarsson@ambiento.se eller Anders Grönwald anders.gronwald@ambiento.se så berättar vi mer!
 



  





 Med vänlig hälsning,
 



 Vännerna på Ambiento

title: IoT Product Manager
description:
At Tele2, we challenge the telecom industry to create more valuable solutions for our customers. Guided by our challenger mindset, we deliver high-quality connectivity and digital services, ranging from mobile and fixed networks to TV, streaming and global IoT.
   

  

 Sustainability is an integral part of how we work. Tele2 has been recognized as a climate leader in Europe by the Financial Times and named Sweden’s most sustainable company, reflecting our long-term commitment to reducing our environmental impact and advancing circular solutions together with our customers.
   

  

 Our values – Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficiently – guide our culture, how we collaborate and how we turn ideas into action.
   

  

 Tele2 IoT with it’s HQ in Sweden, is one of Europe's leading provider of managed IoT connectivity. Recognized by Gartner’s Magic Quadrant as one of the top global providers for Managed IoT Connectivity Services, we are passionate about the power of IoT to create a smarter world.
   

  

 We believe in the power of IoT to enable a smarter world. Our culture is built on collaboration, trust, and what we call IoT Love, a genuine commitment to our customers, our people, and the impact we create together.
   

  

**IoT Product Manager**
 We are looking for an IoT Product Manager to join our IoT organization and lead products focused on SIM, eSIM, and Remote SIM Provisioning (RSP). In this role, you will help shape the future of global IoT connectivity by working closely with internal teams and partner ecosystems. You will own the product vision and roadmap for connectivity solutions that enable scalable, secure, and seamless device connectivity across global markets.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 You are a strategic and technically minded Product Manager understands the evolving landscape of SIM, eSIM, and Remote SIM Provisioning technologies and are comfortable working at the intersection of business, technology, and partner ecosystems. You are able to drive initiatives from concept to launch while balancing commercial goals, operational requirements, and industry standards to shape the future of global IoT connectivity through innovative, secure, and seamless connectivity solutions.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Define and drive the product strategy and roadmap for SIM, eSIM, and RSP capabilities
* Collaborate with sales, technical architects, operations, and commercial teams to deliver scalable IoT connectivity solutions
* Work with ecosystem vendors on integrations and platform evolution
* Manage SIM vendor relationships, including evaluation, selection, performance tracking, and coordination to ensure quality, scalability, and alignment with product and business requirements
* Lead SIM profile creation and personalization-related BAP processes with SIM vendors, including requirements definition, technical evaluation, vendor alignment, and selection to ensure scalable and compliant eSIM/RSP profile provisioning capabilities
* Lead initiatives around lifecycle management, subscription management, and remote provisioning
* Own the business case, budget, and financial performance of the product area, including cost optimization and investment prioritization
* Translate customer and business needs into product requirements and technical specifications
* Follow GSMA standards and industry developments related to eSIM and IoT connectivity
* Identify opportunities for optimization, automation, and new product capabilities
* Coordinate cross-functional stakeholders throughout the product lifecycle
* Lead go-to-market (GTM) initiatives, including product launches, trainings for internal stakeholder enablement, and operational handover processes
* Collaborate with marketing to develop product positioning, launch materials and sales collateral for internal and external audiences


**What We’re Looking For**
* Experience in Product Management within telecom, connectivity, or IoT domains
* Good understanding of SIM/eSIM technologies and Remote SIM Provisioning (RSP)
* Familiarity with GSMA specifications such as SGP.02, SGP.22, and SGP.32
* Curious about new technologies such as In Factory Profile Provisioning ( IFPP ) and soft sim
* Experience working with mobile operators, connectivity providers, or telecom platforms
* Ability to work effectively with technical teams and understand APIs, backend systems, and platform architecture
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills
* Professional proficiency in English
* Hands-on experience with SM-DP, SM-DP+, EIM, eUICC, or subscription lifecycle management is considered a plus
* Background in IoT connectivity platforms, device lifecycle management, or global operator integrations is an advantage
* Knowledge of cloud-native architectures, telecom core systems, embedded connectivity, or large-scale IoT deployments is beneficial


**Benefits**
 Pension and health care
   

  

 Hybrid and flexible work life balance
   

  

 Career opportunities
   

  

 Parental benefit
   

  

 Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
   

  

 Inclusive workplace

title: Warehouse Manager SE
description:
Acne Studios is a progressive luxury house and through collaboration and curiosity, we set high aspirations and strive for excellence. We value everyone’s contribution and embrace feedback to develop ourselves and others. We aim to minimise our environmental impact across all our operations and to address societal challenges in the way we conduct our business.
   

  

 As Warehouse Manager SE, you play a key role in translating these ambitions into operational excellence. You lead and develop the warehouse operation to deliver high‑quality logistics performance across all channels, while creating a safe, inclusive and motivating environment where people can grow and perform at their best. You will be based at our Warehouse in Spånga.
   

  

 With a forward‑looking and hands‑on mindset, you take full ownership of both strategic development and daily execution. You drive continuous improvement across processes, structure and ways of working, ensuring a flexible, efficient and scalable warehouse operation that supports Acne Studios’ continued growth.
   

  

 CULTURE OF COLLABORATION
   

  

 We firmly believe that when you feel supported, included, and trusted, it enables you to enjoy your work and thrive in it. You will be a part of a team of colleagues with diverse roles and backgrounds, each with their unique skills and experiences.
   

  

 WHAT YOU WILL DO
   

  

 As Warehouse Manager SE, you translate strategic direction into strong operational performance while building a flexible and scalable logistics setup that supports Acne Studios’ growth. You lead the long‑term development of the warehouse while staying closely connected to daily operations, ensuring high standards, efficiency and strong team performance by:
   

  

* Owning the end‑to‑end management of Warehouse SE, including all core warehouse flows (inbound, outbound, returns, e‑tail and special flows) and related operational and administrative processes.
* Leading, developing and engaging the warehouse team through recruitment, planning, training and hands‑on daily leadership, while securing accurate time reporting in Quinyx.
* Remaining operationally involved by regularly participating in warehouse activities to ensure deep process understanding and continuous improvement.
* Driving performance and collaboration through regular performance follow‑ups, annual reviews and close partnerships with internal and external stakeholders.
* Managing supplier and procurement activities, including contract evaluation, invoice approval in MediusFlow and cost control in line with budget expectations.
* Working closely with wholesale, retail and e‑tail teams to deliver a seamless, high‑quality logistics experience across all channels.
* Ensuring accurate stock handling through returns management, discrepancy investigations, regular stock counts and the annual full inventory.
* Securing compliance with Health & Safety regulations and following up on warehouse KPIs together with the Supply Chain Manager EMEA.


 WHO YOU ARE
   

  

 You have high aspirations and focus on details that create substantial impact. You enjoy working as a team and you embrace feedback to develop yourself and others. You are curious and thrive in a dynamic environment. Cooperation, respect, and clear communication are important, along with your ambition to learn and grow. If these qualities speak to you, we would love to have you on our team.
   

  

 Specific personal qualities for this role:
   

  

* Leads by example with a hands‑on, execution‑focused mindset
* Communicates clearly and builds trust across teams
* Takes strong ownership and follows through
* Solves problems with structure and pragmatism
* Fosters an inclusive, high‑performing team culture
* Self‑driven, business‑minded and collaborative


 Specific experience and knowledge for this role:
   

  

* Bachelor’s degree in business, engineering or a related field
* At least five years of leadership experience in a labor‑intensive environment
* Minimum three years of hands‑on experience in warehouse operations
* Proven ability to optimize processes and manage daily operations
* Fluent communication skills in Swedish and English
* Strong analytical, numerical and systems proficiency (ERP, WMS, MS Office)


 What matters most to us is not whether you master all the listed knowledge and skills. We are dedicated to recognising the potential in each individual. We embrace diversity of people as well as ideas and viewpoints and encourage everyone's individual expression of their own identity.
   

  

 A background check will be conducted on the final candidate as part of our standard recruitment process.

title: Robotics & Factory Automation Expert (AI Enabled Automation)
description:
**A Snapshot of Your Day**
 As the Robotics & Factory Automation Expert, you will focus on designing, deploying, and scaling robotic and automation solutions in factory and operational environments, leveraging AI where it adds clear, immediate value. Your primary mission is to drive practical automation improvements today—reducing manual work, improving safety and quality, and increasing throughput—while laying the foundation for future physical AI capabilities.
   

  

 In the near term, you will work hands‑on with industrial robots, cobots, vision systems, and factory automation to deliver tangible results. In parallel, you will explore how emerging physical AI and embodied AI technologies can be evaluated, tested, and gradually introduced as the technology matures.
   

  

**How You’ll Make An Impact**
* Design and implement robotics and factory automation solutions that address real, near‑term manufacturing and operational challenges.
* Lead automation use cases involving industrial robots, cobots, vision‑based inspection, and semi‑autonomous systems.
* Integrate automation solutions with manufacturing systems (MES, IIoT, sensors, PLCs) to enable scalable and maintainable deployments.
* Apply AI selectively and pragmatically (e.g. vision, decision logic, adaptive control) where it clearly improves automation outcomes.
* Improve safety, quality, consistency, and productivity by reducing manual and repetitive tasks.
* Standardize automation approaches and reusable building blocks across factories and sites.
* Explore and assess physical AI / embodied AI trends, pilots, and proofs‑of‑concept to prepare the organization for next‑generation automation.


**What You Bring**
* Strong hands‑on experience in robotics, factory automation, or industrial automation in real production environments.
* Practical understanding of industrial robots, cobots, automation cells, and safety‑critical systems.
* Experience combining automation with AI or data‑driven techniques (e.g. computer vision, adaptive logic, edge AI).
* Solid knowledge of manufacturing processes and operational constraints.
* Ability to balance short‑term delivery with long‑term technology exploration.


**About The Team**
 You will join a forward-thinking team dedicated to revolutionizing manufacturing through digital and AI innovation. The team partners closely with engineering, operations, IT, and digitalization experts to deliver transformative solutions that drive efficiency, resilience, and growth. Together, you will champion best practices, share knowledge, and foster a collaborative environment where continuous improvement and technological advancement are at the heart of everything you do.
   

  

 Our
 **Gas Services division** 
 offers Low-emission power generation through service and decarbonization. Zero or low emission power generation and all gas turbines under one roof, steam turbines and generators. Decarbonization opportunities through service offerings, modernization, and digitalization of the fleet.
   

  

 We can offer you employment benefits such as: reduction of working hours, advance vacation, health care allowance and an eventual possibility to a flexible working place.
   

  

**Who is Siemens Energy?**
 At Siemens Energy, we are more than just an energy technology company. With ~100,000 dedicated employees in more than 90 countries, we develop the energy systems of the future, ensuring that the growing energy demand of the global community is met reliably and sustainably. The technologies created in our research departments and factories drive the energy transition and provide the base for one sixth of the world's electricity generation.
   

  

 Our global team is committed to making sustainable, reliable, and affordable energy a reality by pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We uphold a 150-year legacy of innovation that encourages our search for people who will support our focus on decarbonization, new technologies, and energy transformation.
   

  

 Find out how you can make a difference at Siemens Energy: https://www.siemens-energy.com/employeevideo
   

  

**Our Commitment to Diversity**
 Lucky for us, we are not all the same. Through diversity, we generate power. We run on inclusion and our combined creative energy is fueled by over 130 nationalities. Siemens Energy celebrates character – no matter what ethnic background, gender, age, religion, identity, or disability. We energize society, all of society, and we do not discriminate based on our differences.
   

  

**Application**
 Don’t hesitate – apply via https://jobs.siemens-energy.com/en\_US/jobs , id nr 286888 not later than 2026-06-30.
   

  

 Ongoing selection is applied, the role might be filled before last application date.
   

  

 We refrain from all contact with staffing and recruitment companies, or advertising brokers.
   

  

 Location: Finspång, Solna or Trollhättan
   

  

**Trade Union Representatives:**
 Unionen, unionen.finspang.se@siemens-energy.com
   

  

 Sveriges Ingenjörer & SACO, asi.se@siemens-energy.com
   

  

 Ledarna, Anders Fors, anders.fors@siemens-energy.com
   

  

 IF Metall, Mikael Malmgren, mikael.malmgren@siemens-energy.com

title: Backend Engineer (Java/Spring)
description:
**The Company**
 PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for more than 25 years. Creating innovative experiences that make moving money, selling, and shopping simple, personalized, and secure, PayPal empowers consumers and businesses in approximately 200 markets to join and thrive in the global economy.
   

  

 We operate a global, two-sided network at scale that connects hundreds of millions of merchants and consumers. We help merchants and consumers connect, transact, and complete payments, whether they are online or in person. PayPal is more than a connection to third-party payment networks. We provide proprietary payment solutions accepted by merchants that enable the completion of payments on our platform on behalf of our customers.
   

  

 We offer our customers the flexibility to use their accounts to purchase and receive payments for goods and services, as well as the ability to transfer and withdraw funds. We enable consumers to exchange funds more safely with merchants using a variety of funding sources, which may include a bank account, a PayPal or Venmo account balance, PayPal and Venmo branded credit products, a credit card, a debit card, certain cryptocurrencies, or other stored value products such as gift cards, and eligible credit card rewards. Our PayPal, Venmo, and Xoom products also make it safer and simpler for friends and family to transfer funds to each other. We offer merchants an end-to-end payments solution that provides authorization and settlement capabilities, as well as instant access to funds and payouts. We also help merchants connect with their customers, process exchanges and returns, and manage risk. We enable consumers to engage in cross-border shopping and merchants to extend their global reach while reducing the complexity and friction involved in enabling cross-border trade.
   

  

 Our beliefs are the foundation for how we conduct business every day. We live each day guided by our core values of Inclusion, Innovation, Collaboration, and Wellness. Together, our values ensure that we work together as one global team with our customers at the center of everything we do – and they push us to ensure we take care of ourselves, each other, and our communities.
   

  

**Job Summary:**
 As PayPal continues its mission to revolutionize commerce, we’re looking for a skilled Backend Software Engineer to join our team in Stockholm. In this role, you’ll take on meaningful technical challenges and work closely with cross-functional teams to build products that serve millions of users worldwide. If this sounds exciting, read on — the best is yet to come!
   

  

**Job Description:**
**Essential Responsibilities:**
* Delivers complete solutions spanning all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) (design, implementation, testing, delivery and operations), based on definitions from more senior roles.
* Advises immediate management on project-level issues
* Guides junior engineers
* Operates with little day-to-day supervision, making technical decisions based on knowledge of internal conventions and industry best practices
* Applies knowledge of technical best practices in making decisions


**Expected Qualifications:**
* Minimum of 5 years of relevant work experience and a Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience.


**Additional Responsibilities & Preferred Qualifications:**
**Your day-to-day**
 As a Backend Software Engineer, you’ll design and implement robust backend solutions while collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality products. Your day-to-day will primarily involve:
   

  

* Designing and developing scalable backend systems.
* Optimizing system performance and reliability.
* Learning from and supporting other engineers.


**What You Need To Succeed**
* Advanced proficiency in Java, with strong expertise in core concepts, design patterns, and optimization techniques.
* Extensive hands-on experience with Java frameworks like Spring (Spring Boot, Spring MVC) and Hibernate, building scalable and maintainable solutions.
* Proven experience in designing and implementing high-performance RESTful services, focusing on scalability, reliability, and performance in production environments.
* Strong ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams, contributing to technical leadership through code reviews, design discussions, and mentoring junior engineers.
* Deep knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure), utilizing them to deliver cost-effective and scalable solutions.
* Expert understanding of both relational and NoSQL databases, with hands-on experience in ORM tools like Hibernate to ensure efficient data handling and performance tuning.


**Get bonus points if you also have...**
* Experience with large-scale, high-performance systems.
* Knowledge of the payment processing industry and relevant regulations.
* Contributions to open-source projects.
* Familiarity with microservices architecture and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).


**We Believe in You**
 Interested in knowing more? Don't hesitate to apply and/or let's talk – we'd love to get to know you!
   

  

 \_
   

  

**Subsidiary:**
 PayPal
   

  

**Travel Percent:**
 0
   

  

 PayPal does not charge candidates any fees for courses, applications, resume reviews, interviews, background checks, or onboarding. When making an application directly, we will never ask you to share passwords, one-time passcodes (OTP), or verification codes. Any such request is a red flag and likely part of a scam. All communication regarding your application will come from official PayPal email domains. If you suspect fraudulent activity, please report it immediately. To learn more about how to identify and avoid recruitment fraud please visit https://careers.pypl.com/contact-us.
   

  

 For the majority of employees, PayPal's balanced hybrid work model offers 3 days in the office for effective in-person collaboration and 2 days at your choice of either the PayPal office or your home workspace, ensuring that you equally have the benefits and conveniences of both locations.
   

  

**Our Benefits:**
 At PayPal, we’re committed to building an equitable and inclusive global economy. And we can’t do this without our most important asset-you. That’s why we offer comprehensive, choice-based programs, to support all aspects of personal wellbeing—physical, emotional, and financial—delivering meaningful value where it matters most. We strive to create a flexible, balanced work culture with a holistic approach to benefits, including generous paid time off, healthcare coverage for you and your family, and resources to create financial security and support your mental health.
   

  

**Who We Are:**
 Click Here to learn more about our culture and community.
   

  

**Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 PayPal provides equal employment opportunity (EEO) to all persons regardless of age, color, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, race, religion, creed, gender, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, genetic information, marital status, status with regard to public assistance, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law. In addition, PayPal will provide reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities. If you are unable to submit an application because of incompatible assistive technology or a disability, please contact us at paypalglobaltalentacquisition@paypal.com.
   

  

**Belonging at PayPal:**
 Our employees are central to advancing our mission, and we strive to create an environment where everyone can do their best work with a sense of purpose and belonging. Belonging at PayPal means creating a workplace with a sense of acceptance and security where all employees feel included and valued. We are proud to have a diverse workforce reflective of the merchants, consumers, and communities that we serve, and we continue to take tangible actions to cultivate inclusivity and belonging at PayPal.
   

  

 Any general requests for consideration of your skills, please Join our Talent Community.
   

  

 We know the confidence gap and imposter syndrome can get in the way of meeting spectacular candidates. Please don’t hesitate to apply.

title: Strategic Operations Project Manager
description:
Acne Studios is a progressive luxury house and through collaboration and curiosity, we set high aspirations and strive for excellence. We value everyone’s contribution and embrace feedback to develop ourselves and others. We aim to minimise our environmental impact across all our operations and to address societal challenges in the way we conduct our business.
   

  

 As Strategic Operations Project Manager, based at our Stockholm office, you will lead the execution of key strategic initiatives and guide cross-category development projects from concept through delivery. Acting as a central connector across teams, you bring clarity, structure and momentum, aligning stakeholders, maintaining focus and ensuring projects are delivered with precision and strong results.
   

  

 CULTURE OF COLLABORATION
   

  

 We firmly believe that when you feel supported, included, and trusted, it enables you to enjoy your work and thrive in it. You will be a part of a team of colleagues with diverse roles and backgrounds, each with their unique skills and experiences.
   

  

 WHAT YOU WILL DO
   

  

 As Strategic Operations Project Manager your main contribution will be to drive structure, clarity and momentum across development projects, ensuring that strategic initiatives and seasonal projects are executed with precision and aligned with business priorities. You will report to RTW Development Director. You will play a vital role in enabling efficient, well-coordinated ways of working across teams, securing on-time delivery, balanced budgets and strong collaboration by:
   

  

* Drive development projects in close partnership with suppliers and in alignment with business objectives, alongside the RTW Development Director
* Collaborate cross-functionally to define clear project scope, goals, deliverables and timelines
* Establish effective project structures, aligning on priorities, resources and ways of working
* Lead stakeholder meetings with clear agendas, ensuring focused and outcome-driven discussions
* Track progress against milestones and provide clear, timely updates to key stakeholders
* Build and maintain the annual development calendar to ensure visibility and seasonal alignment
* Oversee seasonal project budgets, monitor performance and support informed decision-making
* Enable strong cross-functional collaboration, ensuring seamless processes that support both creative and commercial goals


 WHO YOU ARE
   

  

 You have high aspirations and focus on details that create substantial impact. You enjoy working as a team and you embrace feedback to develop yourself and others. You are curious and thrive in a dynamic environment. Cooperation, respect, and clear communication are important, along with your ambition to learn and grow. If these qualities speak to you, we would love to have you on our team.
   

  

 Specific personal qualities for this role:
   

  

* A clear and confident communicator, able to engage, influence and align stakeholders across functions
* Highly structured and detail-oriented, thriving in a dynamic, fast-moving environment
* Proactive and solution-driven, with a hands-on and pragmatic approach to challenges
* A collaborative team player, skilled at building momentum and bringing people together


 Specific experience and knowledge for this role:
   

  

* An academic degree in business, fashion, textiles or a related field
* Around five years’ experience in a similar role, ideally within high-end or luxury fashion
* Strong planning and prioritisation skills, with the ability to balance multiple work streams
* Advanced proficiency in MS Office, with a particular strength in Excel
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English


 What matters most to us is not whether you master all the listed knowledge and skills. We are dedicated to recognising the potential in each individual. We embrace diversity of people as well as ideas and viewpoints and encourage everyone's individual expression of their own identity.

title: Systemförvaltare
description:
**Ekonomiavdelningen** 
 vid Stockholms universitet ansvarar för universitetets ekonomistyrning, redovisning och ekonomiadministrativa processer samt systemförvaltning.
   

  





 Vi söker nu en systemförvaltare som vill ha en viktig roll i förvalta och vidareutveckla universitetets ekonomisystem i nära samverkan med verksamheten.
   

  





 Vi befinner oss i ett utvecklingsskede med ökad digitalisering och en kommande upphandling av nya ekonomiadministrativa system, där du får möjlighet att bidra både i det dagliga arbetet och i större förändrings- och utvecklingsinitiativ.
   

  





 Mer information om oss finns på: Ekonomiavdelningen.
   

  





**Arbetsuppgifter**




 I rollen arbetar du nära verksamheten med att identifiera behov, ge stöd till användare  och bidra till att utveckla universitetets ekonomisystem och arbetssätt.
   

  





 Du arbetar med att fånga upp behov från verksamheten och omsätta det till förbättringar i system och processer. Arbetet sker i nära samarbete med kollegor inom ekonomiavdelningen, IT-avdelningen och andra delar av universitetet.
   

  





 Du deltar i utvecklings- och förändringsarbete, till exempel genom kravställning och prioritering av förbättringar.
   

  





 Stockholms universitet arbetar aktivt med att digitalisera och automatisera sina processer, där du bidrar i det löpande arbetet.
   

  





 Ekonomiavdelningen ansvarar idag för ekonomisystemet Raindance och upphandlingssystemet Kommers eLite. Universitetet står inför en kommande upphandling av nya ekonomiadministrativa system, där du kommer att vara delaktig.
   

  





**Du kommer att** 



* arbeta med systemförvaltning av ekonomiadministrativa system
* bidra till utveckling av ekonomiadministrativa system och arbetssätt
* dokumentera incidenter, rutiner och arbetssätt i systemet
* samverka med systemleverantörer och hantera leverantörskontakter
* ge användarstöd och genomföra utbildningar inom ditt ansvarsområde
* delta i samverkansgrupper internt och externt vid behov
* arbeta nära IT-avdelningen i frågor som rör systemutveckling och förändringar.



**Kvalifikationer**




 Du kan till exempel ha arbetat som controller med intresse för system, eller som systemförvaltare med fokus på ekonomiadministrativa processer. Rollen passar dig som trivs med att arbeta nära verksamheten i gränslandet mellan ekonomi och system.
   

  





**Krav** 



* Relevant högskoleutbildning inom exempelvis systemvetenskap, ekonomi eller motsvarande.
* Erfarenhet av arbete med ekonomiprocesser i kombination med systemstöd.
* Erfarenhet av ekonomiadministrativa system.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i större organisationer eller komplexa verksamheter.
* Förståelse för hur ekonomisystem kan stötta verksamhetsutveckling och effektivisering.
* Förståelse för verksamhetsprocesser och ett strukturerat arbetssätt.
* Förmåga att analysera behov och omsätta dessa till krav eller förbättringar.
* God förmåga att uttrycka dig väl på svenska och engelska, i både tal och skrift.



**Meriterande** 



* Erfarenhet av liknande roll inom offentlig sektor, exempelvis universitet, högskola eller myndighet.
* Erfarenhet av ekonomisystem, exempelvis Raindance.
* Erfarenhet av upphandlingssystem, exempelvis Kommers e‑lite.



**Personliga egenskaper** 



* Du har ett intresse för hur system kan användas för att utveckla och effektivisera ekonomiprocesser.
* Du är lyhörd och möter människor på ett positivt sätt.
* Du är samarbetsinriktad och trivs med att arbeta tillsammans med olika delar av verksamheten.
* Du kommunicerar tydligt och anpassar ditt budskap efter mottagarens behov och förutsättningar.
* Du har en god analytisk förmåga och kan omsätta verksamhetens behov till konkreta förbättringar.
* Du tar ansvar för ditt arbete, driver uppgifter framåt och trivs i en roll med både operativa och utvecklingsinriktade inslag.



**Om anställningen**




 Anställningen gäller tills vidare på heltid med sex månaders provanställning. Stockholms universitet tillämpar individuell lönesättning. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
   

  





**Vi erbjuder**




 Hos oss får du dynamiken i samspelet mellan högre utbildning och forskning som gör Stockholms universitet till en spännande och kreativ miljö. Du arbetar i en internationell miljö och får förmånliga villkor. Universitetet ligger beläget i Nationalstadsparken med goda förbindelser till city.
   

  





 Stockholms universitet värnar om att vara en arbetsplats som är fri från diskriminering och ger lika rättigheter och möjligheter för alla.
   

  





**Kontakt**




 Ytterligare information lämnas av ­­­­ekonomichef Agneta Pantzare, tfn 08-16 19 17, agneta.pantzare@su.se.
   

  





**Ansökan**




 Du söker anställningen via Stockholms universitets rekryteringssystem. Du som sökande ansvarar för att ansökan är komplett och att den är universitetet tillhanda senast sista ansökningsdag.
   

  





 Anvisningar för sökande finns på webbsidan: att söka en anställning.
   

  





 Stockholms universitet bidrar till det hållbara demokratiska samhällets utveckling genom kunskap, upplysning och sanningssökande.

title: Plattformstekniker till Sveriges Radios Kubernetesplattform
description:
Företagsbeskrivning gömd på alla jobb på hela kontot. Kontakta Jobylon för att visa igen.
   

  

 Sveriges Radios uppdrag är att sända radio i allmänhetens tjänst och vi har 7,4 miljoner lyssnare i veckan. Över hälften av befolkningen tar del av vårt utbud i någon form varje dag. Antingen i direktsänd linjär radio eller on-demand, i FM, på våra egna digitala plattformar eller hos andra aktörer. Vi erbjuder trovärdig kunskap, fördjupning, sällskap och förströelse. Att jobba på Sveriges Radio innebär därför att du, oavsett roll, är en värdefull del i ett viktigt uppdrag.
   

  

 Sveriges Radio är en utpräglad tech-organisation. När du lyssnar på oss är det 100 års konstant teknikutveckling från en arena i teknologins framkant du hör. Bakom varje program och sändning, i varenda kanal och plattform, finns ett kraftfullt fundament av innovativ teknologi. Som verkar tyst i bakgrunden, dygnet runt, året om, med oerhörda krav på precision och stabilitet. Är man en del av totalförsvaret så är man. Och kraven på oss framåt är om möjligt ännu högre. Vi är idag över 150 IT-experter som ser till att ge röst åt fler röster och starkare berättelser för en större förståelse. Och de utmaningar vi har framför oss har inget utrymme för misslyckanden. Så vill man vara med och göra skillnad, på riktigt, ja då ska man jobba med tech på Sveriges Radio.
   

  

 Vill du vara med och bygga framtidens plattform för Sveriges Radio? Som en del i vårt Kubernetes-team får du en central roll i att forma och vidareutveckla vår plattform – en lösning som är avgörande för att vi ska kunna leverera ljud och innehåll till hela Sverige.
   

  

**Tjänsten och ansvarsområden**
 Du Blir En Del Av Ett Distribuerat Team Som Kombinerar Teknisk Kompetens Med Kreativ Problemlösning Och Starkt Engagemang. Tillsammans Skapar Vi En Stabil, Säker Och Användarvänlig Plattform Som Gör Livet Enklare För Våra Utvecklingsteam. Dina Ansvarsområden
   

  

* Arbeta med drift, utveckling och förbättring av vår Kubernetes-plattform (primärt on-prem) enligt “best practices”.
* Säkerställa att plattformen är tillgänglig, säker och presterar på topp.
* Automatisera processer för att skapa en robust och effektiv miljö.
* Samarbeta nära utvecklingsteam och andra plattformsteam för att ge en smidig utvecklarupplevelse.


**Varför du ska söka**
 När du börjar på Sveriges Radio kommer man snart hitta ditt fingeravtryck i stora delar av mediekonsumtionen för miljontals människor i Sverige – och det hanterar vi (och du) genom att ligga i framkant inom media-tech. Även internationellt. Så är du ute efter att jobba tillsammans med experter och utvecklas samtidigt som du får din röst hörd, då är vi rätt arbetsplats. På Sveriges Radio jobbar ett schyst och ambitiöst tech-team och vi erbjuder alla medarbetare en känsla av mening och syfte, ett sammanhang. Och du får göra skillnad – på riktigt. Din röst, vår framtid. Så är det.
   

  

**Vi Söker Dig Som Har Kompetens Inom**
* Kubernetes och containerhantering
* Nätverkshantering i Kubernetes
* Linux-systemadministration
* IaC/CaC (t.ex. Terraform, Ansible)
* CI/CD-flöden


**Meriterande Om Du Kan/har Intresse Inom Följande**
* Säkerhet
* Github Actions
* OIDC/Federation
* Public Cloud (Azure/AWS/...)
* AI-infrastruktur


 Men viktigast av allt: vi tror på rätt attityd. Om du känner att du passar in hos oss, tveka inte att söka – vi värdesätter din vilja att lära och växa.
   

  

**Frågor och kontaktuppgifter**
 Det här är en tillsvidareanställning med 6 månaders inledande provanställning. Tjänsten är på heltid, med placering i Radiohuset på Gärdet i Stockholm. Frågor om tjänsten besvaras av Balazs Bodor. Vill du komma i kontakt med facket så hittar du alla fackliga kontakter här. Vi arbetar mestadels från kontoret med möjlighet till distansarbete.
   

  

 Vi rekryterare löpande så tveka inte på att skicka in din ansökan redan nu, så återkommer vi med en uppdatering så snart vi vet mer. Sveriges Radio krigsplacerar personal med anställning som överstiger 6 månader.
   

  

 För att fortsätta bredda våra perspektiv och utvecklas som organisation ser vi varje rekrytering som en chans att växa. Vi välkomnar alla att söka våra tjänster – men vill särskilt uppmuntra kvinnor att söka denna roll, då vi i dag har en överrepresentation av män inom IT-enheten.
   

  

*Sveriges Radio är en del av Sveriges kritiska infrastruktur och har en viktig roll inom totalförsvaret. Vår verksamhet omfattas bland annat av regler om säkerhetsskydd och på grund av det genomförs en kontroll av kandidaten för många av tjänsterna i vår verksamhet innan anställning sker. För de tjänster som leder till deltagande i säkerhetskänslig verksamhet eller placering i säkerhetsklass innebär denna kontroll att säkerhetsprövning genomförs i enlighet med säkerhetsskyddslagen.*
**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Projektledare och applikationsexpert dpCom
description:
*Digpro är en stor innovatör inom geografisk IT och även marknadsledande i Skandinavien. Vi tillhandahåller lösningar för el, telekom, gas, fjärrvärme, vatten samt stat och kommuner - i själva verket alla organisationer som bygger och underhåller olika sorters nät. Vi är fler än 100 anställda på tre olika kontor, där alla arbetar på ett unikt sätt för att göra geografiska data och kartsystem mer flexibla och effektiva.*




 Digpros produkter spelar en viktig roll i utvecklingen av smart infrastruktur och bidrar aktivt till ökad samhällsnytta. Nätägare i Skandinavien och UK men även i övriga delar av världen använder Digpros programvara för att förvalta sina nät och driva sina affärsprocesser. Genom avancerade verktyg och funktionalitet för planering, design, byggnad och drift erbjuder Digpro lösningar för hela nätets livscykel.
   

  





 Vill du jobba i ett drivet team och använda din kompetens i uppdrag som gör nytta på riktigt? Nu söker vi en lösningsorienterad konsult inom vår fiberlösning dpCom. Du kommer ingå i vår konsultorganisation och arbeta mot både stora och små telekombolag i framför allt Skandinavien och UK, samtidigt som du stöttar teamet som utvecklar vår mjukvara med verksamhetsnära expertkompetens.
   

  





**Du kommer:** 



* Driva införandet av ny funktionalitet hos våra kunder
* Hjälpa våra kunder att jobba effektivt i sina processer och stötta kunderna genom workshops och utbildningar
* Identifiera kundbehov och ta fram genomförbara lösningar i dpCom
* I rollen som applikationsexpert bidra till produktutvecklingen av dpCom



**Du har:** 



* God erfarenhet av projektledning, gärna inom telekom- eller it-branschen
* God kunskap om fibernät och hur dess fysiska komponenter översätts till digitala motsvarigheter.
* God kunskap om verksamhetsprocesser hos fibernätsägare
* God förmåga att kommunicera på svenska och engelska.



**Du är** 



* Driven och målinriktad
* Intresserad av tekniska lösningar, med ett sinne för problemlösning
* Självgående med en god förmåga att kommunicera och att bygga förtroende i relationer med andra.
* Intresserad av att på ett pedagogiskt sätt dela med dig av din kunskap, till kunder såväl som kollegor.



  
   

  





 Tjänsten är tillsvidare med tillträde snarast. Varmt välkommen att skicka din ansökan med CV och personligt brev genom att klicka på annonsen eller via vår karriärsida på Digpro.com

title: Senior Backend Engineer - Sorting Team
description:
**About The Team**
 We are the team responsible for ensuring that parcels move through our terminal network in the most efficient and cost-effective way possible. Our systems provide sorting instructions that guide parcels between terminals and to their final destinations, whether that’s a customer, parcel locker, or delivery partner. We also deliver real-time parcel data and location insights, enabling smooth and transparent operations across our entire sorting network.
   

  

**Our Vision**
 Our objective is ambitious, We strive to achieve operational excellence across our 40+ terminals in Europe. Any parcel should be able to enter the terminal sorting network at any point and immediately be ready for the next step towards its destination. To achieve this, we ensure that everyone interacting with a parcel — from systems to people — can make smart, fast, and data-driven decisions that minimize the total cost of the flow.
   

  

**How We Work**
 We are a team that listens to what’s needed now, tomorrow, and in the future. Collaboration, experimentation, and continuous improvement are at the heart of how we operate. The team consists of our Engineering Manager, three skilled Backend Engineers, a Product Manager, and a Staff Engineer. This recruitment is to replace one of our Backend Engineers who recently resigned.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Senior Backend Engineer in the Sorting team, you’ll play a key role in shaping how parcels move through our network. You’ll take ownership of projects, features, and the team's scope, from design to delivery, and collaborate closely with engineers, product managers, and stakeholders to solve complex problems that directly impact our operations.
   

  

 You’ll also act as a mentor and technical coach for other engineers, helping to raise the overall technical bar of the team. When things break (as they sometimes do), you’ll be trusted to lead the way in resolving critical issues calmly and effectively.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Take ownership of designing, implementing, and delivering backend features and projects within your domain.
* Break down complex engineering challenges and guide others through solving them.
* Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code that your peers regard as high quality.
* Lead by example in ensuring system stability, performance, and scalability.
* Contribute to and improve our technical roadmap — identifying gaps and proposing meaningful improvements.
* Mentor and onboard other engineers, fostering a high-performing and collaborative team culture.
* Participate in incident management and ensure learnings turn into long-term improvements.
* Collaborate across teams and domains to ensure smooth integrations and a unified technical approach.


**About You**
* You’re an experienced backend engineer with solid experience in Go (or a similar strongly typed language). We mainly work with Go, but you'll touch legacy systems built in JavaScript, Python, Java, or Kotlin. If you’ve seen a bit of everything and enjoy bringing old systems up to modern standards, that’s a bonus!
* You have a deep understanding of building distributed systems and APIs in a cloud environment (preferably GCP or AWS).
* You balance long-term stability with short-term delivery needs, and you care about quality.
* You’re proactive, when you see a problem, you raise it and help solve it.
* You enjoy mentoring others, giving and receiving feedback, and contributing to a strong engineering culture.
* You’re comfortable with ambiguity and confident making decisions that move things forward.
* You understand how technology and operations connect, and you want your work to have a real impact.


**What You’ll Get**
 We can promise you that you will be challenged, develop your skills and have the opportunity to work with truly amazing and competent colleagues. If you like changes and want to set new processes and ways of working - this is the place for you!   Diversity and inclusion are very important to us and we are committed to creating an inclusive work environment. We want to be a workplace where everyone’s perspectives and opinions are valued, and we are dedicated to creating opportunities for all employees to thrive and reach their full potential.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Of course, we have all the necessary and standard benefits in place, but in addition to this, we can also offer:
   

  

* 🌇 Sky-High Office: Modern and newly renovated with a 360-degree view around Stockholm.
* 🐶 Puppy Friendly: Bring your dog to work - we've got a whole floor for our furry friends!
* 🏓 Fun & Games: Ping pong, Shuffleboard, Foosball, and even a Karaoke Room for your leisure time.
* 👶 Parental Pay for Six Months: Step away from work and provide the best care and love to your little one.
* 🎂 A Day Off on Your Birthday: We love to celebrate, so enjoy your birthday to the fullest with a day off each year.
* ⏰ Flexible Hours: Hybrid setup with working hours that adapt to your lifestyle.
* 🥐 Wednesdays Tech Breakfasts: Fuel your midweek with tech talks and tasty bites.
* 👾 Tech Demos: Dive into the latest innovations with our regular tech showcases.
* 💻 Modern Tech Stack: Work with cutting-edge technology every day.


 Diversity and inclusion is very important to us and we are committed to creating an inclusive work environment. We want to be a workplace where everyone’s perspectives and opinions are valued, and we are dedicated to creating opportunities for all employees to thrive and reach their full potential.
   

  

*This recruitment process consists of background checks via Verifiera as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.*
 Instabee Group, with consumer-facing brands Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy, brings together years of experience in delivery. Today, Instabee Group is present in five markets, serving thousands of online merchants and millions of consumers with seamless home deliveries and convenient parcel locker deliveries, using the best fuel available. With smart technology, a strong focus on sustainability, and a secure supply chain, Instabee has become a trusted partner for online merchants and a preferred choice for consumers.

title: Office Assistant
description:
**Job Description**
**Office Assistant**
 Från och med augusti 2026 öppnas möjligheten upp för dig att bli vår klippa i rollen som Office Assistant på vårt fina Stockholmskontor. Vi söker dig som vill vara vårt ansikte utåt och som brinner för service och ordning och reda.
   

  

 På vårt Stockholmskontor är vi idag 90 engagerade medarbetare inom konsultbranschen. Bolaget är en del av en global koncern och du bör därför trivas i in internationell arbetsmiljö. Vi värdesätter våra medarbetare högt och strävar efter att alla ska trivas på kontoret, därför kommer du som Office Assistant att spela en viktig roll på bolaget. Du är den första personen våra besökare möter – och ofta den sista de ser när de går. Du är den som ser till att allt från klientmöten till sociala aktiviteter på kontoret blir lyckade, och att kontoret alltid är top notch. Du kan magin kring att leverera smarta lösningar, samtidigt får du alla att känna att just du gjort deras dag.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 För att lyckas som Office Assistant hos oss så tycker du att det är viktigt med en hög servicenivå, du känner glädje i att hjälpa andra och du är kommunikativ. Rollen ställer höga krav på organisationsförmåga samt förmåga att prioritera och överblicka din arbetsdag, då det ofta är full fart och mycket som händer samtidigt. Det är även en framgångsfaktor att brinna för projektledning i stort som smått – både när det kommer till kontoret och vid olika aktiviteter. Viktigast av allt kan vara känslan av ägandeskap och att du drivs av att leverera det där lilla extra.
   

  

**Vilka blir dina arbetsuppgifter?**
* Receptionen: Välkomna våra gäster och samarbetspartners, koordinera inkommande samtal, ta emot leveranser och bud
* Kontoret: Säkerställa att post och mail hanteras och vidarebefordras till ansvarig person, att kontorsmaterial alltid finns tillgängligt samt att våra arkivrum, förråd och övrig förvaring är organiserade
* Köket: Se till att alla ytor är i perfekt skick, att det finns nykokt kaffe, förbereda gemensamma frukostar, ansvara över beställning av dryck, snacks och övrig mat
* Möten: Supportera i mötesbokningar, proaktivt säkerställa att allt flyter på kring både interna och externa sammankomster samt att våra mötesrum och reception är prydliga och välkomnande
* Event: Ansvara för sociala event, allt från planering och inköp till genomförande och koordinering med vårt fina kontor i Malmö
* Onboarding: Kvalitetssäkra introduktioner av nya kollegor i samarbete med HR, både i termer av kontorsplats, nödutgångar, brandsäkerhet, uppsättning i system, förmåner och arbetsutrustning
* Ekonomi: Samarbete med vår interna finansavdelning gällande hantering och effektivisering av kostnader


**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**
 CSC sitter centralt beläget i fräscha lokaler i en av Hötorgsskraporna, på tionde och elfte våningen. Vi är ett gäng som tycker om att hitta på saker tillsammans och vi värderar högt en arbetsplats som både utvecklar och utmanar oss. Vi erbjuder dessutom goda möjligheter till personlig och professionell utveckling samt konkurrenskraftiga anställningsvillkor och härliga förmåner. Vad sägs om exempelvis 5000 kr i friskvårdsbidrag, eller en cykel eller SL-kort varje månad?
   

  

 För frågor gällande tjänsten eller rekryteringsprocessen är du varmt välkommen att kontakta Talent Aquisition Partner Naomi Thomas (engelskspråkig) på naomi.thomas@cscglobal.com .
   

  

**About Us**
 CSC is a global business, legal, and financial services company based in Wilmington, Delaware, USA, providing knowledge-based solutions to clients worldwide. We have offices and capabilities in over 140 jurisdictions in the Americas, Europe, Asia Pacific, and the Middle East, and more than 8,000 colleagues. We are the business behind business.®
   

  

 Visit our careers site to learn more about CSC and our commitment to our clients, communities, and each other.
   

  

 CSC is committed to creating a feeling of belonging through a diverse and growth-oriented environment where everyone is valued.
   

  

 CSC colleagues have global career opportunities and excellent benefits, including annual success-sharing bonuses or commission plans based on individual performance. To learn more, visit cscglobal.com/service/careers .
   

  

 We offer a range of support to colleagues with disabilities, ensuring people have the necessary resources to thrive in their roles. We encourage candidates to work closely with our talent acquisition partners to convey their specific needs. Our commitment to accessibility reflects our broader dedication to diversity and belonging,
   

  

 CSC only accepts resumes from employment agencies that are part of our approved supplier program. Resumes submitted from other agencies either to talent acquisition, our hiring leaders, employees, or through any other mechanism other than our supplier process, will not be eligible to claim related fees and the submitted resumes will be considered property of CSC.
   

  

 We encourage candidates to apply directly to our website and not through third-party sources.
   

  

*Disclaimer: The information above describes the general nature and level of work performed by employees in this role. It is not intended to describe all duties, responsibilities, and qualifications.*
**About The Team**
 At CSC®, we’re always looking ahead, finding ways to innovate, challenge the status quo, and anticipate the needs of our clients. We exceed expectations by adapting client ambitions and goals as our own. This Fierce Client Spirit has helped us adapt and create solutions that have enabled businesses to run smoother and smarter for more than 125 years. It’s also the reason we’re the trusted partner of many of the world’s most successful organizations.
   

  

 CSC is committed to attracting, developing, and retaining talented people whose values align with ours. We empower our colleagues to bring the right solutions to market to meet client demand. That’s why we are the leading provider of business administration and compliance solutions.
   

  

* CSC is a great place to work with smart and dedicated people.
* We have won several employer recognition awards, including Top Workplace USA, Great Places to Work India, and Built In’s Best Places to Work.
* We offer fulfilling work and career opportunities. Most positions are filled with internal moves and employee referrals.
* Employees are eligible for Success Sharing, bonuses, or commission plans based on role and individual performance.
* CSC offers a competitive and comprehensive benefits package that includes annual leave, tuition reimbursement, referral bonuses, and more.
* As business needs allow, CSC offers hybrid or remote work schedules in alignment with local regulations. Specific details for this position will be discussed during the interview process.

title: Delivery Project Executive
description:
**Join the Core of OX2** 




 For more than 20 years, OX2 has been at the forefront of accelerating the transition to renewable energy. Today, we are scaling across Europe, and we are looking for leaders who want to not only shape projects today, but the future of how they are delivered.
 



  





 It is a chance to join a growing Project Delivery team that operate at the centre of OX2’s projects execution, value creation and steering, where strategy becomes reality, and where your leadership directly impacts the energy transition.
 



  





 In 2026 alone, our project delivery team leads more than 30 large-scale investments across Europe in onshore wind, solar PV, BESS and hybrid solutions pre and post FID, totalling ~3GW of capacity and >3€bn of total investment. We currently present opportunity at numerous levels within our expanding team for ambitious and talented individuals, including country portfolio directors, project directors, and project managers to be based in Sweden, Italy, and Poland.
 



  





 We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and experiences and we are committed to building diverse leadership teams - because we know better decisions are made when different perspectives are represented.
 



  





  





**Your Responsibility and Impact** 




 In line with the different levels of responsibility, you will have the opportunity to lead a portfolio or project(s) of large-scale renewable energy projects – taking end-to-end responsibility from late-stage development through execution and up until start of operations, spanning up to 5 years of project lifecycle.
 



 This means ample opportunity to manage complexity, drive and improve project value and commercial business cases, oversee and steer the delivery of a vast range of work packages essential to a successful project investment (e.g development, financing, EPC, offtake, commercial contracts, legal), identify and manage opportunity and risk, and build and manage multiple internal and external key stakeholder relationships.
 



  





 You will work at a scale and a level of central responsibility within the business that is unique, providing leadership to project teams of 30-50 people, and being accountable for average equity investments of EUR hundreds of millions+. You will ultimately operate at the intersection of commercial, technical, financial, and strategic execution and decision-making, with the mandate and trust to shape outcomes. Furthermore, you will have the opportunity to build and or develop within high-performing, diverse teams, strengthen collaboration across functions and geographies, and drive continuous improvement across a growing portfolio.
 



  





 Our ultimate impact is as clear as it is motivating for the people in our enterprise: we successful execute the project delivery portfolio and project targets (e.g. project returns, timeline, budget and risks) and optimize the business case across all relevant phases of project delivery. The achievement of OX2’s full potential is dependent upon you delivering commercially successful, high quality, highly resilient projects. Consistently.
 



  





 Simply put you will define what great project delivery looks like at scale.
 



  





  





**Your Profile in the Business**
