 Peab är den nordiska samhällsbyggaren med stark lokal förankring. Här får du möjlighet att bidra till att bygga ett hållbart samhälle – samtidigt som du utvecklas i din professionella roll.
   

  

**Vi Erbjuder**
* Ett meningsfullt arbete med tydlig samhällsnytta
* En kultur präglad av våra värderingar: Jordnära, Utvecklande, Personliga och Pålitliga
* Stora möjligheter till kompetensutveckling och påverkan
* Ett brett nätverk och många kontaktytor i organisationen


 Peab samarbetar med Awexia Executive Search i denna rekrytering. För frågor om tjänsten, vänligen kontakta ansvarig rekryteringskonsult Fredrik Hammarwall via e-post: fredrik.hammarwall@awexia.com eller telefon: +46 76 318 36 06. Du ansöker om tjänsten genom denna länk till Awexias hemsida .
   

  

 Vi kan komma att genomföra bakgrundskontroller på våra slutkandidater som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess.
   

  

 I denna rekrytering har vi gjort ett aktivt val av annonsering och rekryteringsstöd och avböjer oss vänligt men bestämt kontakt från rekryterings- eller annonseringsbolag.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder**
 I Peabkoncernen blir du delaktig i det spännande arbetet att bygga framtidens hållbara samhälle. Vi engagerar oss i sociala frågor och i frågor som rör miljön för de människor som nu och i framtiden påverkas av det vi bygger och anlägger. Vi vill tillvarata all kompetens på arbetsmarknaden och eftersträvar mångfald.
   

  

 Det är viktigt för oss att du delar våra kärnvärden jordnära, utvecklande, personliga och pålitliga eftersom de är grundläggande för det vi gör. Hos oss finns stora möjligheter till personlig utveckling. Vill du bygga ett hållbart samhälle med oss?
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

 Sök tjänsten
   

  

 Peab är Nordens samhällsbyggare med 13 000 medarbetare och en omsättning på 58 miljarder kronor. Med lokal närvaro och fokus på egna resurser utvecklar, anlägger och bygger vi vardagen där livet levs. Huvudkontoret finns i Förslöv på Bjärehalvön i Skåne. Aktien är noterad vid Nasdaq Stockholm.

title: Underrättelseanalytiker GSS/K
description:
Vill du ha ett meningsfullt arbete och bidra till ett säkrare Sverige i en osäker omvärld? Det förändrade omvärldsläget medför att vårt försvar behöver förstärkas. Underrättelseverksamheten och säkerhetshoten mot Sverige och Försvarsmakten är omfattande.
   

  

 Marinstabens Underrättelse- och säkerhetsavdelning(M2) bedriver verksamhet inom militär underrättelse- och säkerhetstjänst. Avdelningen består av två sektioner, säkerhetssektionen och underrättelsesektionen.
   

  

**Om Marinstabens underrättelsesektion**
 Sektionen ansvarar för inhämtning, bearbetning, analys och delgivning av marina underrättelser avseende externa hot mot Sverige och svenska intressen. Marinstabens underrättelsesektion är en del av den svenska underrättelsetjänsten med uppgift att följa den marina utvecklingen i närområdet och upprätthålla den marina lägesbilden. Sektionens arbete sker nära och tillsammans med övriga funktioner inom den militära underrättelsetjänsten, Försvarsmakten i stort samt med andra myndigheter. Sektionen består av blandade personalkategorier, OF, SO, GSS och CVAT inom olika åldrar.
   

  

**Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter**
 I rollen som underrättelseanalytiker kommer du delta i strukturering och bearbetning av data. Du kommer såväl enskilt som i samarbete med andra delar ur Marinens underrättelsesektion producera lägesbilder, rapporter och beslutsunderlag.
   

  

**KRAV**
**Kvalifikationer**
* Godkänd grundläggande gymnasiebehörighet
* Grundläggande militär utbildning
* Dokumenterad förmåga att behärska svenska och engelska på en mycket god nivå, såväl muntligt som skriftligt
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i olika IT system samt Office paketet, med fördel Excel, Word, Outlook och PowerPoint


**Personliga egenskaper**
 Du är van vid att arbeta mot uppsatta mål, såväl enskilt som tillsammans med andra. Du har god förmåga att söka kunskap på egen hand och tar ansvar för ditt eget arbete. Du gillar utmaningar, är engagerad, prestigelös och stimuleras av att arbeta i en föränderlig miljö. Du förväntas ha hög personlig integritet och god förmåga att skapa goda relationer. Stor vikt läggs vid personliga egenskaper och lämplighet.
   

  

**MERITERANDE**
* Erfarenhet av arbete inom försvarsunderrättelsetjänst, militär underrättelse- eller säkerhetstjänst
* Erfarenhet av marina operationer
* Erfarenhet av arbete i militär stab
* Dokumenterad kunskap i främmande språk
* Internationell tjänstgöring


 För att myndighetens uppdrag ska vara framgångsrikt förutsätts att alla medarbetare uppträder enligt den värdegrund som finns. Försvarsmaktens värdegrund slår vakt om alla människors lika värde, rättvisa och jämlikhet och främjar demokrati och mänskliga rättigheter (läs mer på www.forsvarsmakten.se).
   

  

**Övrigt**
 Anställningsform: Tidsbegränsad anställning enligt avtal för anställning av gruppbefäl, soldater, sjömän inom Försvarsmakten (GSS/K). Det innebär en tidsbegränsad anställning upp till åtta år med möjlighet till förlängning ytterligare fyra år. Anställningen inleds med sex månaders provanställning om du inte redan är anställd i myndigheten.
   

  

 Sysselsättningsgrad: Heltid.
   

  

 Arbetstid: Största delen förlagd dagtid under vardagar 08.00-16.30, men andra tider kan förekomma vid behov med hänsyn till marinens operativa uppgifter.
   

  

 Arbetsort är Muskö söder om Stockholm.
   

  

 Tillträdesdatum 2026-08-01 eller enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Försvarsmakten, Marinstaben har upprättat en bussförbindelse som startar vid Centralen i Stockholm med stopp längs vägen till Muskö, tur och retur på givna tider Inrikes resor, övningsdygn och beredskapstjänstgöring förekommer.
   

  

**Upplysningar om befattningen**
 Kontakta Julius Karlbom.
   

  

**Information om rekryteringsprocessen**
 Kontakta Jenny Winberg.
   

  

**Fackliga företrädare**
 OFR/O – Fredrik Lambert
   

  

 OFR/S – Björn Engren
   

  

 SEKO – Lenny Johansson
   

  

 SACO – Åsa Zackrisson
   

  

 Samtliga personer ovan nås via FM växel 08-788 75 00.
   

  

**Ansökan**
**Välkommen med din ansökan senast 2026-06-19. Din ansökan ska innehålla CV och ansökningsbrev där du motiverar varför du är lämpad för denna befattning samt svar på angivna urvalsfrågor.**
 ,
 **Ansökningar till denna befattning kommer endast tas emot via Försvarsmaktens webbplats.** 
 -------------------------------------------------------- Information om Försvarsmakten och det rekryterande förbandet: Försvarsmakten är inne i ett omfattande utvecklingsarbete för att bygga ett starkare försvar mot bakgrund av ett försämrat omvärldsläge och ny försvarspolitisk inriktning med fokus på det nationella försvaret. Ledning för ett starkare försvar syftar till att öka robustheten, förenkla lednings- och lydnadsförhållanden samt genom decentralisering av mandat och ansvar öka förutsättningarna för uppdragstaktik. Inom ramen för detta arbete har Försvarsmakten organiserat en Marinstab för ledning av de Marina förbanden. Marinstaben är etablerad på Muskö i Haninge kommun. I Försvarsmakten finns en stark värdegrund som bygger på öppenhet, resultat och ansvar. Professionell utveckling och personlig hälsa värdesätts och uppmuntras. Det finns goda förutsättningar för intern karriärrörlighet, friskvård samt bra balans mellan arbete och privatliv. En anställning hos oss innebär placering i säkerhetsklass. Vanligtvis krävs svenskt medborgarskap. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll kommer att genomföras före anställning enligt 3 kap i säkerhetsskyddslagen. Med anställning följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. I anställningen ingår även en skyldighet att tjänstgöra utomlands. Innebörden av detta varierar beroende på typ av befattning. Till ansökan om anställning ska CV och personligt brev bifogas. Om du går vidare i anställningsprocessen ska alltid vidimerade kopior av betyg och intyg uppvisas. Samtal från externa rekryteringsföretag och säljare undanbedes.

title: Product Owner - Treasury Applications
description:
**Your role**
 Do you want to drive the development and lifecycle of the Treasury application portfolio and lead digital transformation in Treasury processes across the organization? Do you enjoy working in an agile environment, close to internal customers, where new initiatives and possibilities are constantly emerging and the products are delivered and continuously improved to accelerate productivity of thousands of users?
   

  

 Come and join our team, Group Applications, in Atlas Copco Group IT!
   

  

 In the role of the
 **Product Owner** 
 , your primary responsibility is to deliver and maintain
 **Treasury IT applications** 
 , namely Trax, Quantum, and Multibank, in line with Atlas Copco’s business needs while safeguarding system and data integrity.
   

  

 You also act as the technical subject matter expert for the Treasury applications, ensuring their compliant operation and ongoing stability.
   

  

 You may lead a highly motivated virtual, cross-regional team, delivering quality services for our internal customers. Your team will be a combination of internally assigned personnel and external service providers.
   

  

 Roles & Responsibilities
   

  

**Strategy**
 Responsible for product portfolio positioning (vision, architecture, roadmap)
   

  

* Align with business stakeholders in setting priorities and driving product projects
* Develop and maintain product and technology roadmap
* Establish product governance structure
* Create Service Operating Model and define KPIs
* Develop communication strategy
* Solution Financial Management


**Demand to Delivery**
 Responsible for designing, developing/acquiring, piloting, and delivering the Treasury products in line with Atlas Copco’s group business needs
   

  

* Work closely with the regional teams and business stakeholders to identify, evaluate and align core business needs
* Prioritize development requests and ensure quality delivery
* Define technical aspects, plan resources, and create exit criteria of POC/MVP
* Monitor testing, plan product launch and ensure robust go-to-production procedure
* Prepare for Service Readiness: unit price, charge model, governance body, documentation


**Operation**
 Responsible for maintaining the Treasury products in line with Atlas Copco’s group business needs, leading technology solutions globally while safeguarding operational governance
   

  

* Design and implement product support process, including documentation and procedures for 1st, 2nd and 3rd level support
* Oversee supplier management and delivery quality of the Managed Services;
* Drive product adoption with support of regional delivery team
* Monitor and improve product performance (incidents, requests, usability, CSI, etc.)
* Improve customer experiences to enhance productivity
* Supervise change management and release management; lead rollout of the product and new functions
* Drive marketing, training and communication initiatives; manage business key users’ community
* Ensure product compliance including access management, technical debt, and adherence to (local) regulations.
* Perform cost analysis and financial control with Business Control's support
* Implement Productized Way of Working under guidance of Architecture & Innovation team


 You will report to Group Applications Manager.
   

  

**Location**
* Brno, Dublin, Shanghai, Stockholm - one of the following cities


**To succeed, you will need**
 We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and experiences. If you have a strong foundation in IT applications, particularly in the financial domain, and are passionate about leading digital innovations, we encourage you to apply.
   

  

**Experience Requirements**
* 5+ years of experience in IS/IT applications support and management in Treasury domain (finance domain is acceptable)
* Experience with Treasury processes and apllications in a large, complex, multi-location organization
* Experience with IT best practice / ITIL; ITIL certification desired
* Proven Project Management and business analysis capabilities


**Technical Skills**
* Treasury Systems Expertise
* In-depth knowledge of Treasury Management Systems (TMS), particularly:


* 
+ Trax: Centralized payment processing and approval workflows, fraud prevention and risk controls, including rule‑based checks and alerts, auditability, segregation of Duties, multi‑level approvals, and access controls
+ Quantum: Understanding of internal FX, loans, deposits, cashflow forecasting, in-house bank settlements, and month-end reporting.
+ Multibank: Experience in configuring data, conducting testing with banks, and managing bank channel integrations.

* SWIFT Infrastructure
* System Administration


* 
+ Admin-level experience with Trax, Quantum, Multibank
+ Managing access rights, compliance, and change/release processes.
+ Compliance & Audit Readiness


* 
+ Familiarity with audit principles such as the 4-eyes principle.
+ Ensuring systems are audit-ready and compliant with internal governance.


**In return, we offer**
* A friendly, family like atmosphere.
* Have the flexibility and freedom to keep a healthy work live balance.
* Plenty of opportunities to grow and develop your own career path.
* A culture known for respectful interaction, ethical behaviour, and integrity.
* Potential to see your ideas realized and to make an impact.
* New challenges and new things to learn every day.
* Access to global job opportunities, as part of the Atlas Copco Group.


 Local benefits will be explained by local recruiters.
   

  

**Job location**
**Location:** 
 Brno, Dublin, Shanghai, Stockholm
   

  

 This role offers a hybrid working arrangement, allowing you to split your time between working remotely and being on-site at our office.
   

  

**Uniting curious minds**
 Behind every innovative solution, there are people working together to transform the future. With careers sparked by initiative and lifelong learning, we unite curious minds, and you could be one of them.

title: Strategic Key Account Manager
description:
**About The Role**
 We are seeking an experienced and highly motivated
 **Key Account Manager** 
 to join our team at our headquarters in Stockholm. In this role, you will take ownership of some of our most valuable merchant relationships within e-commerce. You will strengthen partnerships, drive growth, and ensure long-term success, while also leading complex projects and initiatives. We are looking for someone who can challenge partners and clients in a constructive way, delivering real value to all stakeholders and making a measurable impact on the business.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Manage and grow a portfolio of strategic accounts, developing tailored strategies to maximize revenue and profitability.
* Build and maintain senior-level client relationships, ensuring needs are met and expectations consistently exceeded.
* Identify and capture new business opportunities while adapting solutions to evolving client needs.
* Lead contract negotiations, securing mutually beneficial agreements.
* Analyse sales data and market trends to identify opportunities for growth and improvement.
* Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to deliver exceptional client outcomes.
* Provide regular reports on account performance and communicate effectively with senior management.


**What We're Looking For**
 In order to be successful in this role, you have proven experience in a similar role, ideally within e-commerce or last-mile logistics. You bring a mix of strategic vision and hands-on execution, with a consultative approach that challenges clients and creates real value. As you can see we’re looking for someone outstanding and when we review your profile, we’ll look for evidence of:
   

  

* A bachelor’s degree in business administration, marketing, or a related field.
* 7+ years of experience in key account management, or project management
* Demonstrated project leadership experience, managing complex client initiatives end to end.
* A strong track record of exceeding targets and growing key accounts.
* Proven experience negotiating with and managing relationships at C-level.
* Experience in logistics and/or e-commerce (highly advantageous).
* Exceptional communication, negotiation, and relationship-building skills.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
* Proficiency with CRM systems and sales reporting tools.
* Fluency in Swedish and English, both verbal and written.


**What You’ll Get**
 We can promise you that you will be challenged, develop your skills and have the opportunity to work with truly amazing and competent colleagues. If you like changes and want to set new processes and ways of working - this is the place for you!
   

  

**Benefits**
 Of course, we have all the necessary and standard benefits in place, but in addition to this, we can also offer:
   

  

 🌇 Sky-High Office: Modern and newly renovated with a 360-degree view around Stockholm.
   

  

 🐶 Puppy Friendly: Bring your dog to work - we've got a whole floor for our furry friends!
   

  

 🏓 Fun & Games: Ping pong, Shuffleboard, Foosball, and even a Karaoke Room for your leisure time.
   

  

 ⏰ Flexible Hours: Hybrid setup with working hours that adapt to your lifestyle.
   

  

 👶 Parental Pay for Six Months: Step away from work and provide the best care
   

  

 and love to your little one.
   

  

 🎂 A Day Off on Your Birthday: We love to celebrate, so enjoy your birthday to the fullest with a day off each year!
   

  

**Get to know us**
 In 2022, Instabee was founded after combining Budbee and Instabox - two leading last-mile delivery companies with three consumer-facing brands: Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy. Instabee serves millions of consumers across Europe with convenient deliveries and is on track to become the leading European e-commerce enabler. Always with our people, the merchants and our consumers at the heart of everything we do.
   

  

 We’re fast, both in terms of parcel delivery and when it comes to growing our business. So far our journey has taken us from Sweden to the rest of Scandinavia and parts of continental Europe, but we have no plans on stopping anytime soon. As we continue to expand, the complexity of Instabee grows in parallel. With that in mind, we’re now looking for you to help us on the journey ahead.
   

  

*This recruitment process consists of background checks via Verifiera as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee (Instabox/Budbee) in Sweden.*
 Instabee Group, with consumer-facing brands Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy, brings together years of experience in delivery. Today, Instabee Group is present in five markets, serving thousands of online merchants and millions of consumers with seamless home deliveries and convenient parcel locker deliveries, using the best fuel available. With smart technology, a strong focus on sustainability, and a secure supply chain, Instabee has become a trusted partner for online merchants and a preferred choice for consumers.

title: SVT söker Senior Nätverkstekniker - Säkerhet
description:
**Vad Vi Erbjuder Dig**
 SVT:s uppdrag handlar ytterst om att stärka demokratin, värna sanningen och föra människor samman i en tid när mycket drar isär. Vår vision är tydlig: kunskap och gemenskap – i din och allmänhetens tjänst. Nu tar vi nästa steg och ställer om till en snabbfotad produktorganisation – med målet att bli ett av de mest innovativa mediebolagen. Vill du vara med och forma infrastrukturen som gör svensk public service möjlig – varje dag, i alla lägen?
   

  

**Vem Vi Tror Att Du Är**
 Du har förmåga att ta egna initiativ och driva utveckling framåt på ett självgående och ansvarsfullt sätt. Du arbetar strukturerat och trivs med att omsätta idéer till praktiska lösningar. I en verksamhet som stundtals präglas av högt tempo och sändningskritiska förutsättningar har du ett noggrant arbetssätt och kan behålla fokus även när mycket pågår samtidigt. Du kommunicerar tydligt och trivs med att samarbeta med både tekniska och icke‑tekniska verksamhetsområden.
   

  

**Vi Söker Dig Som Har**
* Eftergymnasial utbildning med inriktning mot nätverk och datorkommunikation eller motsvarande kunskaper som kan bedömas likvärdiga
* Flerårig drift och förvaltningserfarenhet av arbete med brandväggar, vpn och andra säkerhetslösningar
* Flerårig erfarenhet av att såväl förebygga som aktivt motverka hot och attacker mot it-miljöer såväl från interna som externa håll
* Flerårig erfarenhet av att designa och implementera trafikseparation och segmentering i nätverksmiljöer
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska i såväl tal som skrift


**Meriterande**
* Relevanta certifieringar inom brandväggs‑ och nätverkssäkerhetsplattformar
* Erfarenhet av arbete med produkter från Checkpoint och Fortinet
* Kunskaper inom informations-/ IT-säkerhetsarbete
* Scriptkunskaper för automation (Ansible, Python, Bash)
* Erfarenhet av arbete med SD-WAN baserade lösningar för distansåtkomst


**Vad Den Här Tjänsten Innebär**
 Tjänsten innebär en spännande utmaning inom brandvägg- och nätverksteknik, där du blir en del av ett dynamiskt och framgångsrikt team med omväxlande arbetsuppgifter. I din roll kommer du att vara delaktig i att designa, konfigurera och underhålla komplexa nät och brandväggslösningar. Du kommer att samarbeta nära kollegor för att säkerställa att våra nätverk möter höga standarder för prestanda, säkerhet och tillförlitlighet. Du blir en del av en dynamisk miljö med stundtals högt tempo och med sändningskritisk verksamhet, där noggrannhet och stresstålighet är avgörande.
   

  

**Annat Som Är Bra Att Veta**
 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid, provanställning kan komma att tillämpas. Tjänsten kan innebära schemalagd beredskapstjänstgöring. Svenskt medborgarskap är ett krav då tjänsten kan komma att placeras i säkerhetsklass.
   

  

**Hur Du Ansöker**
 I den här rekryteringsprocessen använder vi oss av urvalsfrågor och CV i stället för att be om personligt brev. Det gör vi för att säkerställa att rekryteringen blir kompetensbaserad och effektiv och att vi får samma viktiga information av alla kandidater. Ansök så snart som möjligt dock senast 27 maj 2026.
   

  

 Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta Anders Janocha: anders.janocha@svt.se. Fackliga frågor besvaras av Jane Andersson (SJF), Maria Nassikas (Unionen), Fanny Lindhe (Saco) och Johan Lindén (Ledarna). Samtliga nås via växeln 08-784 00 00.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Business Manager – Microsoft (f/m/x)
description:
Sii Sweden is expanding its Microsoft offering and is looking for an experienced Business Development Manager to drive growth within the Microsoft 365 ecosystem, with a strong focus on Copilot and Power Platform.
   

  

 In this role, you will be responsible for identifying and developing new business opportunities, building a strong sales pipeline, and driving end-to-end sales processes in the Swedish market. You will work closely with customers to understand their business needs and position Microsoft-based solutions that deliver real business value.
   

  

 You will collaborate with technical experts and delivery teams to shape competitive offerings and build long-term relationships with clients, partners, and Microsoft representatives.
   

  

****Your tasks****
* Identify and develop new business opportunities in the M365 area (Copilot, Microsoft Power Platform).
* Build and manage a strong sales pipeline
* Understand customer needs and develop solutions that leverage the full capabilities of the M365 platform, including Copilot, Power Platform, and Power BI
* Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, partners, and Microsoft representatives
* Stay up to date with the latest developments and trends in the M365 ecosystem
* Cooperate with technical experts to shape competitive offerings on Microsoft-based solutions
* Develop and implement strategic plans to achieve sales targets and expand the customer base
* Drive end‑to‑end sales processes: from lead generation to contract closure
* Provide feedback to the product development team on market needs and opportunities


**Requirements**
* At least 4 years of relevant experience
* Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Marketing, IT, or a related field
* Proven experience in business development, sales, or a similar role, preferably within the IT or technology sector
* Understanding of the M365 ecosystem and its application in solving business problems
* Previous cooperation with Microsoft would be an advantage
* Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
* Ability to translate technical solutions into business value for non-technical stakeholders
* Analytical and problem-solving skills
* Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment
* Willingness to travel as required
* Proficiency in Swedish & English


 Job no. 260505-DTSYF
   

  

 Sii ensures that all hiring decisions are made solely on the basis of qualifications and competence. We are committed to equal and fair treatment of all, regardless of legally protected characteristics. At Sii, we promote a diverse and inclusive work environment, in full compliance with applicable anti-discrimination laws.
   

  

**Benefits For You**
 Solid financial situation
   

  

 Many experts you can learn from
   

  

 Contracts with the biggest brands
   

  

 Refferals program
   

  

 Mentoring program
   

  

 14 authentic core values
   

  

 Inclusive culture based on dialogue
   

  

 Regular integration events and trips
   

  

 Passion Sponsorship Program
   

  

 Open and accessible management team
   

  

 Profit sharing
   

  

 Welcome packs & occasional gifts

title: Associate Patent Attorney, Digital (Software / Artificial Intelligence) - Sweden
description:
Job available in the following locations:
 




 Stockholm, Sweden
 





 Malmö, Sweden 
 




  





***Become our next associate in Sweden.***




  





***Learn from the best; become the best! It’s a great time to join EIP, as we continue to evolve our European business in the Nordics.***




  





***Why we're recruiting?***




  





 We’re growing our Swedish office and are looking for a highly skilled digital patent attorney to join our pan‑European team. You’ll work at the cutting edge of software, AI and computing, with scope to move into telecoms and medical technologies. This is hands‑on, high‑impact work for market‑leading tech clients.
 



  





 With the launch of VisserAI, our attorneys are working with the most cutting edge suite of AI tools, driving up client satisfaction and attorney efficiency. Take your career to the next level with a firm which is leaning into the future of professional services - doing tomorrow's work, today.
 



  





***Why EIP?***




  




* Work on complex, high‑value matters from patent drafting to litigation cases
* Be part of a top‑tier team trusted on some of Europe’s most high‑profile patent cases
* Operate where technologies intersect - AI, robotics, health‑tech and beyond
* Learn alongside experts recognised for depth, rigour and results



  





***Rewards & benefits***




  





 We offer a competitive salary and several benefits:
 



  




* Highly competitive bonus scheme, paid twice per year
* Qualifying examinations sponsorship and study leave
* Comprehensive pension, insurance, and private healthcare package
* Friskvårdsbidrag wellness allowance
* 30 days' annual leave in addition to public holidays
* Opportunities for travel to work with our global colleagues and international client base



  





***About you***




  




* You have 3–5 years’ experience as a patent attorney or patent engineer, during which you have gained a solid understanding of the profession’s requirements and processes.
* You have worked independently with advanced patent matters in relevant technical fields, such as AI, computer-implemented inventions, software, electronics or telecommunications.
* You have documented experience of independently drafting and prosecuting patent applications from idea to granted patent, including handling communication with authorities and responding to office actions.
* You hold an academic degree in computer science, mathematics, electrical engineering or physics – preferably at an advanced level. A doctoral degree is advantageous.
* You are analytical, meticulous and motivated by tackling complex technical challenges. You have also demonstrated initiative and the ability to manage several parallel projects.
* You have excellent written and verbal English communication skills and can tailor your communication to different audiences. Knowledge of Swedish is an asset.
* You have experience of independently building and nurturing client relationships as well as successfully attracting new clients and developing collaborations over time.



  





***Interested?***




  





 If you have any questions about the role, feel free to contact us at talent@eip.com.
 **To apply, please submit your full application via the careers page on our website.** 









***Equal opportunities***




  





 EIP is an equal opportunities employer that values diversity and welcomes applications from all suitably qualified persons regardless of their ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, religious practice or any other perceived differences.

title: Advisory Solution Consultant - Moveworks
description:
**Company Description**
 Moveworks is the Agentic AI Assistant platform that empowers the entire workforce.
   

  

 Our platform enables employees to converse with all of their business systems through natural language to quickly find answers and automate tasks. Powered by the world's most advanced LLMs, our proprietary models, and a sophisticated Agentic AI platform, we're transforming how work gets done by allowing AI to take initiative, streamline complex workflows, and continuously learn and adapt.
   

  

 Moveworks is trusted by over 5.5 million employees at more than 350 of the world’s largest companies, including 10% of the Fortune 500, to automate everyday tasks and streamline business operations. Recognized on the Forbes Cloud 100 and AI 50 lists, Moveworks was also named one of Fast Company’s 2025 Most Innovative Companies and Inc’s Best in Business, in the Best in Innovation category. Moveworks was also recognized at Microsoft’s 2025 Partner of the Year and in 2024, received the AI Breakthrough Award.
   

  

 In December 2025, Moveworks was acquired by ServiceNow, marking a pivotal milestone in our journey to create a single front door to work for all business systems. By combining ServiceNow’s leading workflow automation with Moveworks’ Reasoning Engine and natural language capabilities, we deliver the AI platform for every person and every workflow. Built to go beyond basic summaries to deliver meaningful business impact. Together, our AI acts across enterprise systems to turn conversations into completed work.
   

  

 By joining our team, you’ll be at the forefront of the AI transformation, backed by the global scale of ServiceNow and the agility of a high-growth company. We are looking for world-class talent to help us extend agentic AI to every employee across every corner of the business.
   

  

 Come join us!
   

  

**ServiceNow**
 It all started in sunny San Diego, California in 2004 when a visionary engineer, Fred Luddy, saw the potential to transform how we work. Fast forward to today — ServiceNow stands as a global market leader, bringing innovative AI-enhanced technology to over 8,100 customers, including 85% of the Fortune 500®. Our intelligent cloud-based platform seamlessly connects people, systems, and processes to empower organizations to find smarter, faster, and better ways to work. But this is just the beginning of our journey. Join us as we pursue our purpose to make the world work better for everyone.
   

  

**Job Description**
**What you get to do in this role:**
 The Moveworks Advisory Solution Consultant is a technical & business consultant with the advanced ability to develop, position and provide industry and product specific solutions during sales cycles while achieving quarterly and annual sales goals for an assigned territory.
   

  

* Partner closely with ServiceNow Account Executives as the Moveworks product, AI, and domain expert, supporting complex sales cycles and driving deal strategy across one or more industries.
* Lead customer discovery sessions and workshops to understand business challenges, technical environments, and success criteria, aligning Moveworks capabilities to customer needs and outcomes.
* Deliver compelling, persona- and value-based product demonstrations that “explain by showing” how Moveworks and ServiceNow together automate work and improve employee experiences.
* Facilitate technical and architectural workshops covering Moveworks’ AI/ML approach, integrations, security, and platform architecture, in the context of the customer’s ServiceNow environment.
* Partner with Business Value Services to build data-driven business cases, prioritize use cases, and articulate measurable ROI using reports, calculators, and insights.
* Define customer success criteria and lead the design, execution, and management of end-to-end proof-of-concept engagements.
* Develop trusted relationships with customer stakeholders and client partners, guiding strategic programs such as roadmap alignment, customer journey mapping, and outcome planning in top accounts.
* Collaborate cross-functionally to ensure a smooth transition from pre-sales to post-sales by documenting requirements and facilitating a clean handoff to Customer Success teams.
* Provide continuous feedback to Product Management on customer needs, competitive insights, and market trends to help influence product direction and strategy.
* Stay current on competitive positioning and market differentiation, clearly articulating Moveworks’ value within the broader ServiceNow ecosystem.
* Contribute to team excellence by sharing best practices, reusable assets, and continuously improving demos, presentations, and sales processes to be more scalable and impactful.
* Support field and marketing initiatives, including executive briefings, conferences, user groups, and industry events.


**Qualifications**
**To be successful in this role you have:**
* Experience applying and evaluating AI in enterprise environments, including integrating AI into workflows, decision-making, and problem-solving through automation, AI-powered tools, and data-driven insights.
* Strong understanding of cloud architecture and RESTful APIs, with the ability to leverage self-service tools and configurators to demonstrate “art of the possible” solutions and connect to customer pre-production environments.
* Familiarity with RPA, iPaaS, and low-code/no-code platforms; scripting or coding experience is a plus for building prototypes, custom use cases, and integrations.
* 5+ years of experience in pre-sales solution consulting or sales engineering roles supporting enterprise application platforms.
* Experience in enterprise industries such as technology or telecommunications is preferred.
* Proficiency with the ServiceNow platform or deep technical experience with other enterprise cloud software solutions.
* Demonstrated ability to collaborate cross-functionally with product management, product marketing, partners, and professional services teams.
* Strong territory and pipeline management skills, with experience partnering closely with sales counterparts to drive consistent execution.
* Willingness to travel approximately 50% for customer meetings and internal events.
* Fluent in Swedish and English


 Additional Information
   

  

**Work Personas**
 We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third-party service.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin or nationality, ancestry, age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.
   

  

**Accommodations**
 We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.
   

  

**Export Control Regulations**
 For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.
   

  

 From Fortune. ©2025 Fortune Media IP Limited. All rights reserved. Used under license.

title: Marketing Activation Manager, Travel Retail & Industrial
description:
At Fazer, our driving force is the shared commitment to bringing joy and well-being to people through high-quality, innovative, and sustainable offerings. As we set our sights on the future, we're gearing up to be a consumer-centric, truly international FMCG company, focused on significant growth and improved profitability. We invite you to join us on this exciting journey as we elevate our brands and create meaningful experiences for our consumers and customers.
 


**Join us to elevate Fazer’s brand experience where it matters most – at the point of purchase**
**Marketing Activation Manager, Travel Retail & Industrial**

 We are now looking for a Marketing Activation Manager to drive impactful shopper marketing and activation excellence across Travel Retail & Industrial, part of our Group Commercial Organization, enabling our journey to become a strong international FMCG company.
   

  





 In this role, you will turn brand strategies into high-performing, insight-driven activations that strengthen Fazer’s visibility, shopper engagement, and sales performance across Travel Retail channels and customers. As Marketing Activation Manager, you will play a key role in translating business and brand strategies into best-in-class shopper experiences and activation plans.
   

  





 You will:
 


* Develop and execute shopper marketing platforms for priority brands and categories, based on insights, business objectives, and channel opportunities
* Lead and deliver activation plans across customers, channels, and key touchpoints (in-store, e-com, trade events, exhibitions)
* Drive customer-specific activations together with Key Account Managers, including promotions, POS materials, and visibility solutions
* Manage promotional and novelty projects, ensuring alignment with business needs and building scalable activation
* Own and implement key activation assets, including travel retail assets and exhibition presence
* Ensure strong execution in digital and e-commerce channels, improving Fazer brand visibility
* Analyze activation performance together with sales and controlling to drive continuous improvement



 You will work cross-functionally and externally, collaborating closely with Travel Retail & Industrial Management Team and Category Leads, Brand Managers and BU Marketing teams, Key Account Managers and Field Sales, Consumer Insights and Communications teams, external partners such as agencies, suppliers, distributors, and retail stakeholders. You will also be an active member of key forums such as Travel Retail & Industrial Team, Commercial Excellence Lead Team, Shopper & Marketing Activation Forum, Category and commercial planning processes.
   

  





 This is a permanent position located at our office either in Vantaa (Finland), Stockholm (Sweden), Copenhagen (Denmark), Oslo (Norway) or Warsaw (Poland). You will report directly into the VP of Commercial Excellence and functionally to the Sales Director of Travel Retail & Industrial.
 


**Why choose Fazer?**

 In this role, you will be part of a high-impact commercial role driving growth in an international environment and work at the intersection of brand, customer, and shopper, shaping how consumers experience our brands. You have an important role collaborating across markets and functions in a dynamic, cross-border setup and contributing to building best-in-class marketing activation capabilities
   

  





 We at Fazer want to provide a culture of diversity and inclusiveness where all employees can experience an equal working community with a motivating, respectful and safe work environment.
   

  





**Salary**




 The base salary per month of this position is around 4750 – 5250 €, depending on the knowledge and professional experience of the selected candidate. The salary may vary depending on the country of hire due to local salary levels.
   

  





 This role is eligible for annual bonus plan (as confirmed each year separately by Fazer) with a target level earning potential of 10 % of annual salary. In addition, we offer a range of benefits including for example discounts to Fazer products and well-being benefits.
 


**What you’ll bring to the team?**

 We are looking for a commercially driven marketing professional with a passion for activation and shopper impact within the Travel Retail business. We expect you to have minimum 5 years of experience in shopper marketing, trade marketing, and/or marketing activation within the Travel Retail Industry with proven ability to translate brand and category strategies into shopper centric execution across multiple channels.
   

  





 To succeed in this role, you must have a data-driven mindset with the ability to analyze and optimize performance. You are experienced working in cross-functional commercial teams, have strong stakeholder management and collaboration skills, and you communicate fluently in English; additional Nordic languages are an advantage.
 


**Apply now to create moments that matter.**

 Please leave your application (in English) as soon as possible but no later than Wednesday June 10th. Interviews will be conducted on a rolling basis. For further information, please contact Anna Ek, VP Commercial Excellence, Fazer Sweden at anna.ek@fazer.com (no applications via e-mail please).
   

  





  

  

  





 Fazer, The Food Experience Company, enables people to enjoy the best moments of their day. Our mission, Food with a purpose, builds on our strong more than 130-year heritage, consumer first approach and innovations to create the sustainable food solutions of the future. With our dedicated team of almost 5,000 professionals, we focus on fast-moving consumer goods and our direct-to-consumer business in Northern Europe, and beyond with exports to more than 40 countries. Fazer’s operations comply with its Code of Conduct that is based on the Group’s values and the UN Global Compact. In 2025, Fazer Group had net sales of 1.200 million euros.   
   

  





 Northern Magic. Made Real.

title: Part Time Sales Assistent
description:
**Are you passionate about delivering outstanding customer experiences? SHAPING NEW TOMORROW are looking for a Part Time Sales Assistant enthusiastic to join our team in Stockholm. You will play a key role in creating a welcoming atmosphere and ensuring our customers leave with a smile. If you’re ready to be part of an exciting brand and grow with us, this could be the perfect opportunity for you!**
 Are you looking for a student job or something similar and wish to work around 5 hours a week? Then this job might be for you. The hours will be placed both on mainly weekends and weekdays, but we will of course fit them to your education. Start date is 1 th. July.
   

  

 As a Part Time Sales Assistant in our store in Stockholm, you will be part of our fresh team where you together will have the opportunity to leave your mark on the daily operations and ensure that the store hits the ground running.
   

  

**The role of a Part Time Sales Assistant**
 You will take part in providing our guests with an extraordinary experience in the store, so it is important that you have a passion for sales and great customer service. You will be guided through our unique store concept so that you can ensure great guest experiences - every time.
   

  

 Your primary tasks will be:
   

  

* Sales and customer service
* Providing our guests with guidance on our products
* Ensuring that the store looks sharp - both tidying and stocktaking
* Stock replenishment in the store
* Take part in store events


 The job is a part-time position and your location will be in our store in Stockholm.
   

  

 There may be opportunities for more hours during certain periods, if that suits you. We offer a high degree of flexibility to support your studies – and in return, we appreciate your flexibility during busy times when the team needs an extra hand.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 We have had great experiences with our part-time employees and we see them as being crucial players in our team. As a Part Time Sales Assistant, you will be an important ambassador for SHAPING NEW TOMORROW.
   

  

 We imagine that you:
   

  

* Are easy to be around and understand how to build great relationships with guests and colleagues
* Are flexible and always ready to help
* Can work independently and that you are service-minded
* Have a natural sense of style
* Are outgoing and energetic
* Keep the good vibes in the store and the team


 It is an advantage if you have previous experience in fashion and retail but not a must. Besides your daily tasks, we expect that you can give a hand in busy periods when we are running fast and need all hands on deck.
   

  

**Who are we?**
 SHAPING NEW TOMORROW has gone from being an ambitious start-up with 10 employees to a fast-growing scale-up company with more than 180 dedicated Shapers. You’ll become a part of a passionate team, where we chase new dreams and challenge the status quo every day. We have a strong community and a unique employee culture where there’s room to spread your wings and focus on personal development. We’re full of ideas, solution-oriented, and focused on running a healthy business.
   

  

 We believe in people and love talents. Our goal is to give our Shapers a healthy and fun work environment that allows them to be themselves and stretch further.
   

  

**Are you ready to become a Shaper?**
 Do you want to be part of our exciting journey? Then do not hesitate to send us your application and CV, as we cannot wait to get our new colleagues on board! Therefore, we will continuously interview relevant candidates until we find the perfect match. So, send us your application as soon as possible.
   

  

 If you have any questions, please reach out to us through our Career Page or feel free to visit our store in Stockholm.
   

  

 In 2015, the story of SHAPING NEW TOMORROW began in the city of Aalborg, Denmark. Three childhood friends set out to change the way we think of traditional menswear, by seamlessly blending the comfort of sportswear with the style of casual business attire. From these beginnings, SHAPING NEW TOMORROW has since grown and evolved into an innovative, tech-oriented, and international clothing brand.

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer | Predictions Team
description:
Every parcel we deliver starts with a prediction
   

  

 At Instabee, our Predictions Team builds the forecasting engines that power one of Europe's fastest-growing logistics networks — from delivery volume predictions to real-time resource scheduling across five markets.
   

  

 We work end-to-end. That means you won't hand off a notebook and call it done. You'll own the full lifecycle: data discovery, model development, production deployment, and ongoing monitoring. If that sounds like the kind of ownership you've been looking for, keep reading.
   

  

**About Your Future Team**
 The Predictions Team sits at the core of how Instabee operates. We are a tight-knit group of engineers with a direct line to the decisions that shape our entire logistics network — from how routes are planned to how we staff our terminals weeks in advance.
   

  

 We take end-to-end ownership seriously. We architect, deploy, and monitor production-grade systems that run at scale across five markets. Our forecasts aren't just nice-to-have insights; they are the inputs that drive real operational decisions every single day.
   

  

 But great models alone aren't enough. We work closely with stakeholders across operations, commercial, and leadership — translating complex analytical outputs into clear, actionable insights that non-technical audiences can act on with confidence. Understanding the business behind the data is just as important to us as the engineering that powers it. The best solutions come from engineers who can sit in a room with a decision-maker, understand what they actually need, and build something that delivers exactly that.
   

  

 We move fast, we care about craft, and we believe the best solutions come from engineers who understand both the data and the business. If you want to work on genuinely hard problems with people who take quality seriously — you'll fit right in.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Design & Develop — Build and refine time-series and ML models that predict delivery volumes with high precision
* Productionize — Take full ownership of deployment via robust CI/CD pipelines into production environments
* Architect Infrastructure — Use containerization and orchestration tools to ensure prediction services scale with the business
* Data Engineering — Collaborate on data collection and preprocessing logic
* Monitor & Optimize — Track performance drift and maintain system health across deployed models


 Your Tech Stack
   

  

**Need To Have**
* Strong skills in Python and SQL
* Strong command of time-series forecasting, neural networks, and tree-based models — built, shipped, and monitored in production
* Hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes — containerizing and orchestrating ML workloads in production
* Proficiency in GCP (or similar) and Terraform — managing cloud infrastructure as code


**Nice To Have**
* Practical experience with stream processing (PubSub or similar) — building pipelines that power real-time predictions
* Background in logistics or supply chain — you understand the operational reality behind the data
* Hands-on experience with Python libraries such as Polars, Prophet, NeuralProphet, or PyTorch — applied to real forecasting challenges
* Experience with orchestration tools such as Argo Workflows — scheduling and managing ML pipelines at scale


 🌟 What You'll Get
   

  

* 🌇 Sky-high office with a 360° view over Stockholm
* ⏰ Flexible hybrid setup
* 💡 Hack Days twice a year
* 🐶 Dog-friendly workplace
* 🥐 Wednesday Tech Breakfasts
* 👾 Regular Tech Demos to stay close to what's coming next
* 💻 Paid licenses for advanced dev tools and AI coding agents
* 👶 Six months parental pay top-up
* 🎂 Your birthday off — every year


 Diversity and inclusion are very important to us and we are committed to creating an inclusive work environment. We want to be a workplace where everyone’s perspectives and opinions are valued, and we are dedicated to creating opportunities for all employees to thrive and reach their full potential.
   

  

 Our Recruitment Process
   

  

* 👋 TA Interview — A first conversation to get to know each other
* 🧠 Hiring Manager Interview — A deeper dive into your experience and ways of working
* 🔬 Technical Case — A chance to show us how you think and solve problems
* 🤝 Meet & Greet — A conversation with your future team
* 📋 Reference Check — We'll speak to a couple of people who know your work
* 🔍 Background Control — A standard check for all hires in Sweden
* 🎉 Contract Signing — Welcome to Instabee!


*This recruitment process consists of background checks via Verifiera as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.*
 Sound like your kind of challenge? We'd love to hear from you.
   

  

 Instabee Group, with consumer-facing brands Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy, brings together years of experience in delivery. Today, Instabee Group is present in five markets, serving thousands of online merchants and millions of consumers with seamless home deliveries and convenient parcel locker deliveries, using the best fuel available. With smart technology, a strong focus on sustainability, and a secure supply chain, Instabee has become a trusted partner for online merchants and a preferred choice for consumers.

title: Senior Systemutvecklare och teknisk ledare för internationell brottsbekämpning
description:
Är du en naturlig ledare som brinner för att koda själv samtidigt som du pedagogiskt förklarar varför en lösning är bäst och ser teamets framgång som din egen?
   

  

**Organisation** 
 It-avdelningen
 **Kommun** 
 Stockholm
 **Län** 
 Stockholms län
 **Utlyst** 
 06 maj 2026
 **Ansök senast** 
 10 juni 2026
 **Referensnummer** 
 A290.978/2026
   

  

 Arbetsplatsbeskrivning
   

  

 Polismyndigheten är Sveriges största myndighet med cirka 40 000 medarbetare och har det avgörande uppdraget att öka tryggheten och minska brottsligheten i samhället. IT-avdelningen, med sina drygt 1 400 anställda, är en central pelare i detta arbete. Vi levererar de digitala verktyg som gör det möjligt för polisen att arbeta effektivt, både brottsförebyggande och brottsbekämpande. Som medarbetare på IT-avdelningen är du delaktig i ett viktigt samhällsuppdrag där din kompetens gör verklig skillnad.
   

  

 Inom sektionen Internationell Samverkan har vi ett särskilt ansvar för att prioritera och styra utvecklingen inom området internationellt samarbete. Vi fungerar som en länk mellan verksamhetens behov och IT-avdelningens olika team, med fokus på att säkra kritiska integrationer mot partners som Europol och andra EU-system. Sektionen arbetar även med utveckling av system som möjliggör snabbare kontaktvägar mellan svenska och internationella partners, vilket direkt stärker förmågan att lösa brott över gränserna och bidra till ett säkrare samhälle.
   

  

 Arbetsbeskrivning
   

  

 Vår uppgift är att ta ett helhetsansvar för nyutveckling, förvaltning och stöd av digitala verktyg och applikationer för Polisens brottsbekämpande verksamhet. Vi ser helt enkelt till att de har bästa tänkbara IT-stöd i sitt arbete med att upptäcka, förebygga och förhindra grov organiserad brottslig verksamhet nationellt såväl som internationellt. Vi är nu inne i en spännande och expansiv fas där vi tar fram nya förmågor.
   

  

 Vi söker en senior systemutvecklare som vill kombinera sitt tekniska kunnande med ett tydligt ledarskap. Du förväntas fortfarande vara aktiv i utvecklingsarbetet, men du har också ett ansvar i att vägleda teamet i arbetet med att ta fram stabila, säkra och förvaltningsbara lösningar som möter den brottsbekämpande verksamhetens behov av ett avancerat IT-stöd.
   

  

 Dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden kombinerar aktivt tekniskt deltagande med ledarskap. Du bidrar till kodning och arkitektur, särskilt inom Java och mikrotjänster, samtidigt som du coachar teamet mot gemensamma kvalitetsstandarder. Som länk mellan teknik och verksamhet gör du svåra problem förståeliga för alla inblandade. Genom att driva kunskapsdelning skapar du en miljö präglad av prestigelöst samarbete, där du även säkerställer att integrationer, databaser och Linux-miljöer är både säkra och hållbara i ett större perspektiv.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer
   

  

 För att trivas och lyckas i rollen behöver du ha:
   

  

* Relevant akademisk utbildning eller examen från relevant YH-utbildning, Alternativt att du har motsvarande förvärvad kompetens som Polismyndigheten bedömer likvärdig.
* Flerårig aktuell arbetslivserfarenhet inom området som arbetsgivaren bedömer relevant för tjänsten.
* Solid teknisk grund med god erfarenhet av systemutveckling i Java, samt vana av SQL-databaser, Linux och design av mikrotjänster. Vi ser att du behöver förstå tekniken på djupet för att kunna leda andra.
* Erfarenhet av att agera som senior utvecklare eller teknisk ledare där du format tekniska beslut och coachat juniora kollegor.
* Förmåga att uttrycka dig flytande och tydligt på svenska, både i tal och skrift, och anpassa nivå efter mottagare.
* Erfarenhet av att bygga stabila integrationer mellan system, med förståelse för säkerhet och prestanda.
* Svenskt medborgarskap


**Meriterande**
 Det är ett plus om du även har:
   

  

* Praktisk erfarenhet av Docker/Kubernetes och gRPC.
* Erfarenhet av testautomatisering och att driva kvalitetsfrågor i teamet.
* Förmåga att visualisera arkitektur och flöden för att skapa gemensam förståelse.
* Praktisk erfarenhet av arbete med Front End.


**Personliga egenskaper**
 Vi söker en naturlig ledare som brinner för att koda själv samtidigt som du pedagogiskt förklarar varför en lösning är bäst och ser teamets framgång som din egen. Du växlar smidigt mellan strategisk helhetssyn och detaljnivå, och tar initiativ till att förbättra både processer och relationer med en prestigelös inställning.
   

  

 Vi kommer att lägga stor vikt vid personlig lämplighet.
   

  

 Kontaktpersoner
   

  

 Har du frågor om uppdraget är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef:
   

  

 010-5637251
   

  

 Har du frågor gällande rekryteringsprocessen kontakta ansvarig HR-konsult:
   

  

 010-5657317
   

  

 Fackliga företrädare
   

  

 Saco-S, saco-s.avdelningarna@polisen.se
   

  

 Polisförbundet, Sofia Ask, tfn 010-563 87 10
   

  

 ST, st.inom-polisen@polisen.se
   

  

 Seko Polisen, Annika Olsen, tfn 076-802 69 60
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning
   

  

 Arbetsort: Stockholm
   

  

 Arbetstid: Dagtid med flex
   

  

 Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Funktion: Systemutvecklare
   

  

 Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna i ditt ansökningsmejl. Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Det är därför viktigt att du svarar tydligt och utförligt på frågorna och inte hänvisar till andra handlingar t.ex. CV.
   

  

**Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.**
 Besvara följande urvalsfrågor som en del av din ansökan.
   

  

* Har du relevant akademisk utbildning eller examen från relevant YH-utbildning, alternativt att du har motsvarande förvärvad kompetens? (JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv kort)
* Har du flerårig aktuell arbetslivserfarenhet inom området som arbetsgivaren bedömer relevant för tjänsten? (JA/NEJ)
* Har du en stabil teknisk grund med god erfarenhet av systemutveckling i Java, samt vana av SQL-databaser, Linux och design av mikrotjänster? (JA/NEJ)
* Har du erfarenhet av att agera som senior utvecklare eller teknisk ledare där du format tekniska beslut och coachat juniora kollegor? (JA/NEJ, om JA beskriv kort)
* Har du förmåga att uttrycka dig flytande och tydligt på svenska, både i tal och skrift och anpassa nivå efter mottagare? (JA/NEJ)
* Har du erfarenhet av att bygga stabila integrationer mellan system, med förståelse för säkerhet och prestanda? (JA/NEJ)
* Har du svenskt medborgarskap? (JA/NEJ)
* Praktisk erfarenhet av Docker/Kubernetes och gRPC? (JA/NEJ)
* Har du erfarenhet av testautomatisering och att driva kvalitetsfrågor i teamet? (JA/NEJ)
* Har du förmåga att visualisera arkitektur och flöden för att skapa gemensam förståelse? (JA/NEJ)
* Har du praktisk erfarenhet av arbete med Front End? (JA/NEJ


 Vänligen notera att krav och eventuella meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället.
   

  

 De uppgifter du lämnar i samband med din ansökan kan användas för att kontakta dig, få information och kallelser samt eventuella anställningshandlingar.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan i form av CV och svar på urvalsfrågor via e-post till jobb.na@polisen.se senast den 27/5 2026. Ansökningar till denna befattning kommer endast tas emot via den mailadress som anges i annonsen.
 **Märk din ansökan med referensnummer A290.978/2026 i mailets ärendemening.**
 Har du skyddade personuppgifter, referenser eller liknande information som du själv bedömer som skyddsvärd rekommenderar vi att du kontaktar ansvarig HR-konsult innan du går vidare med din ansökan.
   

  

 En anställning hos Polismyndigheten kan komma att inledas med en provanställning om sex månader.
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) genomförs innan beslut om anställning fattas. Med anställning följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. Läs mer om krigsplacering och säkerhetsprövning under https://polisen.se/krigsplacering och https://polisen.se/sakerhetsprovning
   

  

 Polismyndigheten kommer att behandla dina personuppgifter i enlighet med reglerna i EU:s dataskyddsförordning (2016/679) och annan tillämplig dataskyddsreglering. Läs mer om vår hantering av personuppgifter på https://polisen.se/personuppgifter/rekrytering
   

  

 Din ansökan är en allmän handling enligt offentlighetsprincipen.
   

  

 Polismyndigheten erbjuder dig en arbetsplats som stimulerar till mångfald, kreativitet och personlig utveckling. Läs gärna om våra förmåner som anställd hos polisen på https://polisen.se/erbjudande
   

  

 Vi bedriver vår verksamhet enligt vår värdegrund: engagemang, effektivitet och tillgänglighet. Som medarbetare inom polisen agerar du för likabehandling. Det är en förutsättning för rättssäkerhet, rättstrygghet och för polisens legitimitet i samhället. Som företrädare för polisen respekterar du allas lika värde och skapar förtroende för polisen.
   

  

 Läs gärna mer om polisen och vår verksamhet på www.polisen.se
   

 www.polisen.se
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

 Vi undanber oss samtal och mejl från dig som vill sälja annons- och rekryteringstjänster.
   

  

 Sök jobbet
   

  

 Ansök via e-post

title: Commercial Account Manager
description:
**Why this role matters:** 




 As a Commercial Account Manager at Ivanti, you’re at the heart of helping our clients overcome the challenges of modern IT, making sure their data stays secure and their systems always run smoothly. Your talent for building relationships and expanding the Ivanti portfolio shapes how IT leaders across the Nordics experience our innovative solutions. By joining us, you help organizations unlock Everywhere Work and reach their full potential. You’ll be part of a global, collaborative team that creates positive impact every single day, for our customers, our company, and the wider business community.
 



**What you’ll do:** 



* Drive new business and up-sell revenue in the Nordic Region
* Manage and grow existing accounts
* Support customers in finding the best solutions for their needs
* Build and execute account plans and strategies
* Generate new sales opportunities and ongoing revenue streams
* Conduct executive and CxO-level discussions and positioning meetings
* Manage the sales process and close opportunities
* Provide ongoing account management and ensure customer satisfaction




**What you will bring:** 



* 4+ years’ experience selling Enterprise Software
* Experience in account management and new business sales
* Proven record of achieving sales targets
* Familiarity with defined sales processes and methodologies to drive repeatable and predictable results
* Ability to see the big picture and understand business drivers related to IT
* Bachelor’s Degree or equivalent
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills
* Talent for building and maintaining customer relationships




**Why Ivanti?** 



* **Flexible working model:** 
 Empower excellence at home or in the office, with support for work-life balance
* **Competitive compensation & rewards:** 
 Health, wellness, and financial plans for you and your family
* **Global, diverse teams:** 
 Collaborate with talented people from over 23 countries
* **Learning & development:** 
 Grow your skills with access to leading learning tools and programs
* **Equity & belonging:** 
 We value every voice, your story matters in shaping our solutions for a changing world



**What drives us** 




 Ivanti’s mission is to elevate human potential within organizations by managing, protecting, and automating technology for continuous innovation. Through diverse and inclusive hiring, thoughtful decision-making, and commitment to our employees and partners, we deliver world-class solutions for our customers.
 



**Inclusion at Ivanti** 




 Ivanti is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We’re committed to building a diverse team and fostering an inclusive environment where everyone belongs. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and walks of life. If you need adjustments as you go through the process, just reach out to talent@ivanti.com we’re happy to help!

title: Founding GTM Manager
description:
**Why this role exists.** 
 Stilla has a product that customers love and a growing base of teams who adopt it bottom-up. This role bridges product-led growth and strategic sales to capture the rapidly growing interest of enterprise customers.
 



  





**What you’ll own.** 
 From first conversation to signed contract - you run the full sales cycle for mid-market and enterprise accounts.
 



  





 Responsibilities
 



  




* **Full-cycle sales.** 
 Own the entire journey from prospecting through discovery, demo, negotiation, and close.
* **Pipeline generation.** 
 Source and qualify your own opportunities
* **Strategic selling.** 
 Map org charts, build multi-threaded relationships with C-level and VP buyers, and craft proposals that connect Stilla to their real business problems
* **Cross-functional collaboration.** 
 Partner with the rest of the team to shape positioning, refine messaging, and feed customer insights back into the roadmap
* **Demo & solutions engineering.** 
 As a founding GTM hire, you own the demo as well. Run live product walkthroughs, build custom demo environments, handle technical questions, and design implementation plans
* **Solution design.** 
 Understand how Stilla fits into a company’s existing workflows and tooling. Tailor the pitch to show concrete ROI
* **Contracting & deal ops.** 
 Draft and negotiate contracts, manage redlines, coordinate legal reviews, and keep CRM data pristine. You maintain your own pipeline hygiene: stages, notes, next steps, forecast accuracy
* **AI-powered workflows.** 
 Use AI tools on a daily basis to automate as much as possible of the above



  





 You’ll thrive in this role if below resonates
 



  




* 4+ years in B2B SaaS sales, strategy consulting, investment banking, or a similar high-velocity environment
* Proven track record of exceeding quota in a fast-paced, high-growth setting
* Can hold a room with a C and VP-level person, and debug a workflow with a product manager - in the same day
* Exceptional communicator, written and verbal
* First-principles thinker who rolls up their sleeves. You don’t wait for playbooks - you write them
* Obsessed with AI and how it’s reshaping how teams work. You’re using the products, not just reading the press releases
* Loves the sales craft, but believe you can own more tasks than what a traditional AE role offers - e.g. demos



  





 This role is probably not for you if you
 



  




* Rather rely on Solution Engineers for demos, and BDR/SDRs for pipeline generation
* Are looking for an immediate manager role as a next step in your career
* Don’t believe that the best thing you can do for your career is becoming AI fluent immediately



  





 What you get
 



  




* Founding team member of a company with exceptional product-market fit
* Selling an AI product in arguably the hottest startup category right now
* Direct access to CEO and co-founder
* A very experienced team who’s done it before - each team member is either an ex-founder, staff/principal engineer or a founding team member of a previous startup
* Backed by top tier investors including General Catalyst ($5M pre-seed). Based in our Stockholm office
* Equity in a company where the hard part (building the product) is done. The fun part (scaling it) is yours

title: Senior Workplace Engineer (Tech Lead) – Entra ID, Solna
description:
PostNord är igång med en strategisk transformation rörande våra katalogtjänster (Microsoft Active Directory och Azure AD/Entra ID) och bygger en modern, säker och långsiktig plattform internt. Nu söker vi en erfaren Workplace Engineer som vill leda arbetet och forma vår framtida identitets- och katalogarkitektur.
   

  

 Det här är en central och högt prioriterad roll där du får möjlighet att driva förändring, påverka tekniska beslut på både operativ och strategisk nivå, och bli en viktig del av vår långsiktiga arkitektur.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som Senior Workplace Engineer (Tech Lead) För Directory Services Har Du End-to-end-ansvar För PostNords AD- Och Entra ID-plattform – Från Målbild Och Roadmap Till Design, Implementation Och Stabil Drift. Du Säkerställer Kontinuerlig Förbättring Och Vidareutveckling Av Tjänsterna Enligt En Modern Och Säker Identitetsarkitektur. I Uppdraget Ingår Att
   

  

* Förvalta och vidareutveckla plattformen (miljö, beroenden, risker) med fokus på stabil drift och förbättringar.
* Ta fram och äga en 3–5-årig roadmap för AD/Entra ID (målbild, prioriteringar, teknisk skuld, livscykel).
* Sätta designprinciper/standarder och säkerställa best practice, säkerhet och efterlevnad.
* Vara teknisk huvudansvarig i förändringar: design, implementation, felsökning och stabil drift.


**Mandat och samarbete:** 
 Du tar dagliga tekniska beslut inom plattformens scope, driver förbättringar och agerar rådgivande i arkitektur- och säkerhetsfrågor kopplade till identitet. Du arbetar nära IAM-teamets produktägare och Workplace Team Lead kring planering och prioritering, samt samverkar med säkerhet, infrastruktur och applikationsteam. I rollen ingår att stötta teamet genom coaching, onboarding och kompetensutveckling.
   

  

**Skall-krav (obligatoriska)**
* Minst 10 års erfarenhet av IT-drift/förvaltning i enterprise-miljö.
* Mycket god kompetens i AD DS och Azure AD/Entra ID i hybridmiljö (design, implementation, felsökning).
* Stark kompetens inom IAM (identitetslivscykel, autentisering/auktorisation och åtkomststyrning).
* Stark analytisk förmåga (rotorsaksanalys samt risk- och konsekvensbedömning).
* Erfarenhet av system-/lösningsarkitektur för plattformstjänster (säkerhet, skalbarhet, HA).
* Vana att arbeta i hybrid/distribuerade team och samverka tvärfunktionellt.
* Erfarenhet av att driva vidareutveckling och förändringar i förvaltning (planering, genomförande och stabilisering i drift).
* Självgående och strukturerad, med god prioriterings- och leveransförmåga.
* Mycket god kommunikation på svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift (tekniska och icke-tekniska målgrupper).


**Bör-krav (meriterande)**
* Erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt (t.ex. SAFe, Scrum eller Kanban).
* Erfarenhet från post/logistik, e-handel eller retail.
* Erfarenhet av att leda, coacha och utveckla kollegor.


**Utbildning och certifieringar**
* Relevant utbildning inom IT/systemvetenskap – eller motsvarande erfarenhet.
* Meriterande certifieringar: AD/AAD/Entra ID (t.ex. AZ-104, AZ-500, SC-900, SC-200, MS-100).


**Du ska må bra**
 Vi är ett modernt kundorienterat företag som tänker lika mycket på våra anställda som på våra kunder. Hos oss erbjuds du ett omväxlande arbete i en internationell miljö med ständigt nya utmaningar och snabba beslut. Förutom schyssta anställningsvillkor enligt kollektivavtal erbjuds du:
   

  

* Flexibel hybrid arbetsplats. Se filmen om vårt kontor.
* Goda utvecklings- och karriärmöjligheter
* Goda försäkrings- och tjänstepensionsvillkor
* Friskvårdsbidrag samt möjlighet att träna på Arkens gym och simhall
* Personalförmåner genom PostNord Plus - vår personalstiftelse


**Vad väntar du på?**
 Välkommen med din ansökan. Urval sker löpande så ansök så snart som möjligt. Som en del av rekryteringsprocessen kan vissa tjänster kräva en bakgrundskontroll. Om du går vidare till ett steg där en bakgrundskontroll är aktuell kommer du att informeras i förväg.
   

  

 Om du har frågor eller funderingar, vänligen maila Susanne.Wetterstrand@postnord.com
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!
   

  

 Här kan du läsa mer om våra fackliga kontakter

title: Sales & Growth [JANUARY]
description:
**Our Sales & Growth-team will be growing in January 2027.** 




  





**Come work with us** 




 Netlight strives to be a truly diverse, equitable and inclusive organization. Regardless of who you are, what personality, background, and experience you have, you enrich our culture through your values. Netlight’s purpose is to unleash full potential, realize great careers, and fulfill personal growth. To achieve this, we have a highly engaged network organization, where every employee gets a mentor, delivery coach and personal communities. The key to our continued success is trust and personal responsibility, diverse experiences, challenging opportunities and developing from personal values. Every Netlighter is an active part of building and shaping this culture, which leads to a clear correlation between personal growth and the growth of Netlight.
 



  





**About us** 




 Netlight provides a full range of premium IT-consulting services at the forefront of the digital industry and stands out for its product- and technology-independent expertise in a wide range of industries and clients. We are a network organization of more than 2 000 role models making aspiring digital leaders successful in their business-critical IT projects. Netlight has been awarded several times as top employer, as well as for growth, continued profitability and engagement for diversity, equity and equality within the IT industry. Today we are growing all across Europe, currently with more than 15 active international offices.
 



  





**Job Description** 




 We are looking to strengthen one of our core teams, our business development, and sales team, in Stockholm, starting in January 2027.
 



  





 Your main responsibility will be around technical sales. The role involves finding and establishing new clients and engagements, maneuvering existing client engagements, as well as collaborating closely with consultants at Netlight to find a great match between Netlighters and client engagements. To fit into this role you will probably be a person who is driven by exploring the tech market, helping people unleash their potential, and building Netlight.
 



  





**Requirements** 



* Graduating in 2025 or 2026.
* Master's degree / Engineering degree.
* Verbal and written fluency in Swedish and English.
* Passion for sales, business development, and the tech industry.
* Experience in relevant areas to the role is a merit, but not a prerequisite, e.g. sales, business development, venture capital, start-ups, networking or similar, perhaps through internships, or engagement in student organizations.



  





**We offer** 



* The possibility to be a core part of growing one of the most successful IT-consultancy companies in the industry.
* A long-term career. Competence development is core and realized through a culture of knowledge sharing, feedback, mentorship, and coaching.
* An international working environment.
* Fixed competitive salary and company-based bonus (no commissions).



  





**Application** 




 Before applying, carefully read through the qualifications. We will get in touch
 
 if
 
 we find that your profile matches our requirements. To increase your chances, make sure to add a personalized cover letter.

title: Senior Sales Manager, Tieto Banktech (m/f/d)
description:
**Job Description**
 Senior Sales Manager - Tieto Banktech (m/f/d)
   

  

 We are looking for a Senior Sales Manager who wants to be part of Tieto Banktech. Tieto Banktech powers some of the Nordics’ most trusted banking systems with secure, reliable, and scalable solutions. Using automation, data, AI, and cloud, supported by hands-on guidance, we help banks modernize their core, strengthen trust, and deliver greater impact across the banking experience.
   

  

**Duties And Responsibilities**
 New Business Development
   

  

* Identify, research, and target potential new customers in assigned countries/regions.
* Actively build and maintain a strong pipeline of qualified opportunities across the full sales cycle.
* Conduct outbound prospecting (calls, emails, LinkedIn outreach, industry networks) to generate new leads.
* Map customer needs, pain points and decision-making processes to position Tieto payment solutions effectively.


 Solution Sales
   

  

* Sell IRPC software and services (Card Suite, Instant Payments, Retail Payments, E-commerce solutions, etc.) to new customers.
* Support other Tieto Business Units with cross-sales.
* Prepare and deliver high-quality presentations, proposals, and commercial offers.
* Lead negotiations and drive opportunities toward successful contract closure.
* Ensure accurate qualification, forecasting, and updating of the sales pipeline.


 Market & Partner Engagement
   

  

* Represent Tieto at conferences, industry events, and partner forums across assigned regions.
* Build strong relationships with key stakeholders: banks, fintechs, PSPs, payment processors, technology partners, and associations.
* Develop partner networks that support lead generation and new sales channels.
* Monitor competitive landscape, market trends, and emerging opportunities.


 Internal Collaboration
   

  

* Work closely with Product, Pre-Sales, Delivery, Legal, and BID Management teams to support bids and RFP/RFI responses.
* Provide structured input to product roadmap based on market needs and customer feedback.
* Maintain transparent communication with management regarding pipeline status, risks, and required actions.


 1.5 Reporting & Compliance
   

  

* Update EDGEcrm systems accurately and in a timely manner (pipeline, opportunities, forecasts).
* Ensure sales processes are followed according to internal guidelines and governance rules.
* Deliver bi-weekly/monthly status update on progress toward potential opportunities and targets.


**Qualifications And Experience**
* Experience & Domain Knowledge
